name: Christina Gagnier
subject: Young Kim is destroying the American Dream
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114380095/566834676/1631137775?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDY0YmJiZS1jNjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqumhThP1hv3WfquwNFks0dITkdqUZKdJgefNKrbWRU=)

Peter,

**Help me save the American Dream. It’s plain and simple. It’s slipping away from all of us as I send this.**

I wanted to reach out with a personal note before tonight’s end-of-month deadline. I hope you read it the entire way through, but if you are short on time, please consider **[chipping in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114380096/566834677/1631137775?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDY0YmJiZS1jNjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqumhThP1hv3WfquwNFks0dITkdqUZKdJgefNKrbWRU=)** to help me flip this seat.

**I need to be blunt: Young Kim is putting the American Dream out of reach for thousands in Orange County and the Inland Empire.**

Our communities should be places where working families can live, work, and thrive. The reality is that people are being forced to commute over two hours to their jobs because of the unaffordability crisis we face.

My family’s American Dream was coming to Orange County and building a life here to be proud of – to own a home, make a living, and raise a family.

That is a far cry from what we are seeing today in this district. People are struggling to make ends meet, and Republicans including Young Kim are making it harder – by gutting programs built to invest in our communities.

It does not have to be this way, and that is why I got in this race. CA-40 families deserve better, and in Congress, I will fight to get it done. I am the only candidate in this race with a track record of getting results for working families.

**[But before I can do that, I need your support to get there. If you believe in my vision, will you chip in $3 before our midnight deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114380097/566834678/1631137775?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDY0YmJiZS1jNjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqumhThP1hv3WfquwNFks0dITkdqUZKdJgefNKrbWRU=)**

name: Abigail
subject: asking one last time...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
How much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send.

Hi Peter, it's Abigail. Our end-of-month deadline is tonight, and I wanted you to hear this from me personally:
_Tonight's deadline is a big one for our campaign._
And yes, how much we raise matters a lot. But it's about more than that. _It's about the message we send._
We have momentum on our side right now. But that could change once our fundraising numbers become public.
If they're strong, the press and my opponent will see the grassroots strength of our campaign. If we fall short, it sends a signal to Winsome Earle-Sears and national Republicans that they can win and bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth.
**That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big.**
[__**So, I'm asking one last time: Will you contribute your first $25 before our end-of-month deadline at midnight to become one of my Founding Donors?**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114380077/566834607/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-31_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjc3ZmRlOTQtYzY4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iv7Ad0kl5lSGfBzx0oPwh6riBPB1OkNEQqIg8PleN-A=)

name: Voter Action Project Registration Team
subject: This year's upcoming elections matter. A lot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Whether you live somewhere with elections in 2025 or not, voter registration is critical work to protect our democracy. We have to do everything we can to bring in new voters, lapsed voters, and voters who have moved and make sure their voice is heard in their next election, whether that's in a few weeks or next year.
Make a difference for our country and RUSH $24 or more for our voter registration efforts right now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=083125_3&amount=24]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
2025 may be an "off year" election as far as Congress goes, but that doesn't mean we don't have important elections this year or we can take a break with our voter registration work, folks.
Voter registration is open in New Jersey until October 14th -- and early voting starts on October 25th. Control of their state legislature hangs in the balance, while it's also an open race for governor as the current governor is term-limited.
Voters can register in Virginia until October 24th , with early voting starting on September 19th. Virginia's legislature is also up for grabs, plus the opportunity to replace the current vote-suppressing governor (who is term-limited) with someone who will protect voting in the commonwealth again.
Our mission is simple: The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help .
It costs us roughly $3 to register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=083125_3&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=083125_3&amount=36]
Yes, there have been a few special elections to fill vacancies, but these elections are our first real opportunity to fight back against the widespread efforts to dismantle our democracy. The results will determine whether our country stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and keep working toward a better future.
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming states nationwide with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- will absolutely tip the scales of these elections towards justice. Please pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a tidal wave of new voters this year! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=083125_3&amount=24]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=083125_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=083125_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. name: Deb Haaland
subject: From my kitchen to yours: green chile chicken posole
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Cooking has always been a way for me to foster connection and build community.
Hey Peter – it’s Deb Haaland. I’m running for Governor of New Mexico and Heartland Patriots said I could reach out to you.
One thing you should know about me is that **I love to cook.**
My love of cooking New Mexican cuisine started early, thanks to the hours I spent watching my grandmother bake bread in her mud oven and stir huge pots of posole. She wouldn’t let us kids in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours. I still hold those memories close as I prepare my favorite traditional New Mexican dishes.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94371?refcode=em20250831-9359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb) _New Mexico chiles – the best in the world!_
**There’s something powerful about connecting with others over a home cooked meal.** When I was in law school at UNM, I’d make chicken green chile stew for student gatherings, and I made that same dish for my Congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season. I even cooked chile and tortillas for the water protectors when I traveled to Standing Rock during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline.
Cooking became more than a hobby after I decided to start my own salsa business. I worked out of a commercial kitchen and bought my red chile pequin from a farm in northern New Mexico. I’d prepare my salsa and deliver jars to mom-and-pop shops across the state, often with Somáh riding with me in the back seat.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94371?refcode=em20250831-9359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb) _Here’s Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa. Kids in New Mexico start early... 🌶️_
**For me, cooking has always been a way to foster connection and build community, which is exactly what we’re doing now as we grow our campaign for New Mexico.** I’ve had the chance to sit down with New Mexicans in living rooms and at kitchen tables to hear about their lives, their struggles, and their hopes for the future. Every conversation is another reminder of the incredibly high stakes in this race – and proof that if we organize around our shared values, we will win.
**[Will you split $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today? If you donate through this link, I’ll even send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94371?refcode=em20250831-9359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94372?refcode=em20250831-9359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94372?refcode=em20250831-9359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94372?refcode=em20250831-9359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94372?refcode=em20250831-9359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94372?refcode=em20250831-9359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94372?refcode=em20250831-9359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94371?refcode=em20250831-9359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb)
---
Happy cooking,
Deb 🌶️
P.S. Throughout my life, cooking has helped me bring my community together – and bringing people together is exactly how we’ll win this campaign. **[If you make a donation of any amount to my campaign and Heartland Patriots through this link, I’ll be sure to send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole so you can cook it for your friends and family.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94371?refcode=em20250831-9359&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb)**

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=12&akid=9359%2E614464%2Eh6kFPb). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Before you set your phone down or turn your computer off for the evening, could you take 60 seconds of your time to chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can swing it right now? name: laura friedman (personal)
subject: Before your long weekend ends:
body:
Hi friend,
Glad I could catch you on this holiday weekend.
I just spoke to my team, and they let me know that we’re still $1,500 or so away from our goal.
Could you help us close the gap by chipping in $3 before midnight?
Here’s a link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q3-2025**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114380752/566848421/-1623651544?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmExZjgyMjktY2E4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iQUIhhDy0VMccha0Q0WYj3baTAJiTIDvuAN7CPfXChg=)
It’s an honor fighting for you in Congress, especially now when our freedoms are under siege. I’ll never let a dictator intimate me or silence my voice when standing up for our communities.
But the reality is that fundraising matters. If we want to fight Donald Trump and flip Congress, we need resources to do it. And since this is a grassroots campaign run for the people, by the people, we need supporters like you to help us keep moving forward.
Our August fundraising deadline closes tonight. Anything you contribute right now helps us expand our reach and strengthen this campaign. Can you use the personalized link below to chip in $3 before midnight?
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q3-2025**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114380753/566848422/-1623651544?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmExZjgyMjktY2E4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iQUIhhDy0VMccha0Q0WYj3baTAJiTIDvuAN7CPfXChg=)
Thank you, friend, and have a wonderful Labor Day.
Laura

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: The work we still have to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
We’ve got until midnight tonight to hit our goal |
#
---
Team, This will be the last time I reach out before our midnight fundraising deadline, and I wanted to take this moment to look forward. We’ve accomplished so much here in Michigan — investing in our kids, creating thousands of good-paying jobs, and delivering results that make a real difference in people’s lives. But I know we have so much more to do. If we meet our goal tonight, we’ll be ready for the big fights ahead: protecting our fundamental freedoms, standing up for working families, and making sure the next generation has more opportunity, not less. **That’s the future I believe in. And that’s why I’m asking, one last time before midnight, will you chip in to help us finish strong? Here’s a personalized and secure link where you can donate:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flhp-em-q3-2025?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114380880/566851753/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTBjZThlMDMtY2I4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QDgnnrMx7q7n0po7y7BK0pGYd6a_1OE89sEFp3t8FdI=) Together, we’ll keep moving forward, keep fighting like hell for our values, and keep proving what’s possible when we don’t back down. name: Kim Schrier (personal)
subject: I’m so impressed by this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Personally reaching out one final time before midnight tonight:
Peter, I want to start with some good news:

We’ve seen a strong uptick in donations, and we’re so close to getting back on track toward our August fundraising goal.

I’m so grateful for everyone who has chipped in since I first reached out. But we still haven’t hit our $20,000 fundraising goal, and I still need your help.

Every single dollar we raise now is money we’ll rely on when it matters most. We need to ensure we have the resources to run ads, talk with voters, organize in our communities, and reach people where they are. But those resources don’t appear overnight. _They’re built steadily, month by month, by folks like you._

I’m not asking you to give us _everything_ we need to win at this moment. But every goal we set is a benchmark that keeps us on track toward our final end goal of winning this election and keeping WA-08 blue. So before midnight tonight, I’m asking: **Will you please chip in one more time and help us close the gap and keep this campaign in fighting shape? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-august-2025?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114380960/566857284/-1487867385?refcode=em25_250831_eom5_fndd_gq_act___kspers_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250831_eom5_fndd_gq_act___kspers_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=d1c81552-cc86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode2=d1c81552-cc86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWM4MTU1Mi1jYzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E7ljUUjQLrdF9LBIj-6l2wyPV30Aoj9fAxN6YkoDpe8=)**

Thank you,

Kim | Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress

clean_body: Personally reaching out one final time before midnight tonight: Peter, I want to start with some good news: We’ve seen a strong uptick in donations, and we’re so close to getting back on track toward our August fundraising goal. I’m so grateful for everyone who has chipped in since I first reached out. But we still haven’t hit our $20,000 fundraising goal, and I still need your help. Every single dollar we raise now is money we’ll rely on when it matters most. We need to ensure we have the resources to run ads, talk with voters, organize in our communities, and reach people where they are. But those resources don’t appear overnight. They’re built steadily, month by month, by folks like you. I’m not asking you to give us everything we need to win at this moment. But every goal we set is a benchmark that keeps us on track toward our final end goal of winning this election and keeping WA-08 blue. So before midnight tonight, I’m asking: Will you please chip in one more time and help us close the gap and keep this campaign in fighting shape? >> = Thank you, Kim | Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Keith Ellison
subject: One last time
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

I’m reaching out one final time before tonight’s deadline to share where things stand: we’ve made strong progress toward our end-of-month goal — but with less than six hours left, we’re still $3,385 short.

I’m using every tool at my disposal to fight for Minnesotans, hold corporations accountable, and stop the Trump administration’s unlawful attacks on our rights and institutions.

But I can’t do this alone, Peter. I’m counting on everyone who can to step up so we can continue fighting — together.

Our records indicate that you’re eligible for the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. This tool allows Minnesotans to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund.

Will you make a fully refundable $75 contribution of $75 to help us reach our goal before midnight?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250831_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250831_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250831_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250831_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250831_2ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250831_2ke?refcode=other]
Thank you,

Keith Ellison

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [secure.actblue.com/donate/em250831_2ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417

clean_body: I am writing to you today with a humble request.| | | Quick update: We’re still ~$3,225 short of our fundraising goal. With the holiday weekend, it’s been a bit slower than we planned for, and we urgently need to close the gap here. Anything you can chip in before midnight will help ensure I have the resources I need to win re-election: Thank you in advance. Enjoy the rest of the weekend. Signing off. Brad \-------- | | Good morning, Peter— I’m writing today with a straightforward request. Our campaign needs to raise $2 million to stay competitive in 2026, and right now, we are about $8,500 short of our August goal. | | | | I know that number sounds lofty. But the reality is that campaigns in and around Raleigh are incredibly expensive, whether you like it or not. Advertising rates keep climbing, and if we want to keep this seat red, we have to keep pace. We did it in 2024—raising nearly $2.5M. And we’ll do it again the same way: one dollar at a time, one supporter at a time. | | | | Thank you, | | | | Brad Knott | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Brad Knott for Congress Copyright © 2025 Knott for Congress Our mailing address is: Brad Knott for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . body:

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: Three facts about three of the GOP-held seats we need to flip in order to take back the Senate in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Democrats are gaining ground in these critically important races.
#

**_Three quick facts about three GOP-held U.S. Senate seats Democrats need to flip to restore our majority in 2026_** **[FLIP THE SENATE: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94367?refcode=em20250831-9357&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9357%2E614464%2E2fqV61)**
---

**— North Carolina —** After GOP incumbent Thom Tillis announced his intent to retire in 2026, Cook Political Report UPGRADED North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race from “Lean Republican” to “TOSS UP!” **[FLIP THIS SEAT: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94367?refcode=em20250831-9357&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9357%2E614464%2E2fqV61)**
---

**— Texas —** Republican infighting in Texas has left its reliably GOP-held Senate seat uniquely vulnerable, resulting in an UPGRADE from “Solid Republican” to “Likely Republican” by Cook Political Report. **[FLIP THIS SEAT: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94367?refcode=em20250831-9357&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9357%2E614464%2E2fqV61)**
---

**— Ohio —** With news of former U.S. Senator Sherrod Brown officially confirming that he will run in Ohio, the Center for Politics UPGRADED Ohio’s Senate race from “Likely Republican” to “Lean Republican.” **[FLIP THIS SEAT: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94367?refcode=em20250831-9357&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9357%2E614464%2E2fqV61)**
---

**_While these shifts might seem small right now, they indicate that Democrats are gaining ground to take back our Senate majority in 2026 — even more than a year out from the election!_**
---

name: DNC HQ
subject: Last chance:
body:
---
Derek, We’re reaching out to ask if you can chip in $3 to the DNC before our FEC deadline in just a few hours. _We’ll be upfront with you: This is our most important deadline since the last election._ Here’s why: Trump and his allies are attacking our democracy. They’re gerrymandering states to give themselves more congressional seats. Trump is threatening to end mail-in voting. He’s even sent the National Guard into Washington, D.C. — a political ploy to intimidate communities and waste resources — and he’s threatening to do the same in other cities. Right now, it’s critical that we send a powerful message to Donald Trump and Republicans: **Democrats are not backing down from fighting for our democracy and for the people.** We’re organizing. We’re standing together. We’re fighting back. In California, Democrats are moving forward with a ballot measure to redraw the state’s maps and counter Republicans’ gerrymandering in Texas. And Democrats in other states are considering redrawing their maps, too. **[Democrats are done fighting with one arm tied behind our back, but we need you with us in this fight. Can you make a $3 contribution before midnight to help support our fight for our democracy?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250831_4458_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4458_22930333__cYirF&akid=4458%2E22930333%2E_cYirF)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250831_4458_fr&refcode2=4458_22930333__cYirF&akid=4458%2E22930333%2E_cYirF)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250831_4458_fr&refcode2=4458_22930333__cYirF&akid=4458%2E22930333%2E_cYirF)**
---
****
Thank you for meeting the moment,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Senator Jennifer Boysko
subject: Boysko Bulletin: Happy Labor Day!
body:
| | |
---
**Boysko Bulletin: Happy Labor Day!
**
---
Dear Peter, It’s Labor Day Weekend! If there has ever been a time to be aware of the important role of our labor force, it is now. The American Federation of Federal, State, and Municipal Employees (AFSME) has been especially under attack since January. Quoting President of AFSME Lee Saunders: “The [power that labor unions bring](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381420/566877629/1508330407?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjZWY2M2YtZDU4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eJCZBszNkPaKsv73EUlurE2yIg4V8SeQ90d8ayuUe-o=&emci=d6945e6f-be86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ccef63f-d586-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22486556) matters more than ever as billionaires and their yes-men in Congress are slashing wages, [**gutting health care**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381421/566877632/-432088271?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjZWY2M2YtZDU4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eJCZBszNkPaKsv73EUlurE2yIg4V8SeQ90d8ayuUe-o=&emci=d6945e6f-be86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ccef63f-d586-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22486556) and silencing working people. Even though working people are the backbone of our economy, “they’re getting squeezed by CEOs and anti-worker politicians who want to hand out tax breaks to the billionaire class at the [**expense of Medicaid**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381422/566877635/-1561718702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjZWY2M2YtZDU4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eJCZBszNkPaKsv73EUlurE2yIg4V8SeQ90d8ayuUe-o=&emci=d6945e6f-be86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ccef63f-d586-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22486556), [**food assistance**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381423/566877637/2077809855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjZWY2M2YtZDU4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eJCZBszNkPaKsv73EUlurE2yIg4V8SeQ90d8ayuUe-o=&emci=d6945e6f-be86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ccef63f-d586-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22486556), [**worker protections**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381424/566877639/-1623251256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjZWY2M2YtZDU4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eJCZBszNkPaKsv73EUlurE2yIg4V8SeQ90d8ayuUe-o=&emci=d6945e6f-be86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ccef63f-d586-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22486556) and our communities,” Saunders said. You have a chance today to use your voice. VOTE! These elections have consequences and can show the rest of the nation that change is possible. As you know, I support the Democratic slate of candidates, including Abigail Spanberger for Governor, Ghazala Hashmi for Lt. Governor and Jay Jones for Attorney General, in addition to our Democratic slate of candidates for the House of Delegates. My choice of candidates is far more than blind faith in a political party. It’s recognizing that the goals of the democratic candidates reflect my values. Government can work for all Virginians, not just the wealthy and not just those who’ve traditionally been in power at the expense of regular working people. Businesses can prosper when everyone has the opportunity for a world-class education, to make the most of their talents, and to succeed in their employment. We work to ensure that our most vulnerable Virginians will not be left behind. We work for a Virginia that is affordable - so everyone can afford medical care, housing, food, transportation, childcare, and eldercare. We work for a safe Virginia - our families should not fear for their children’s lives when they send them off to school. We work for a Virginia with clean air, clean water, and safe food. We work for a Virginia where people have access to healthcare, including abortion and birth control. We work for communities that are vibrant and diverse and welcoming. We work for the preservation of freedom of speech and democracy. You have the power to choose your leaders. Know what the candidates stand for. And vote your values. On September 9, those of us who live in Congressional District 11 will elect a representative to succeed the late Congressman Gerry Connolly. I am strongly supporting James Walkinshaw. Then on November 4, we will vote for a new Governor, Lt. Governor, and Attorney General. [Make sure you are registered and show up.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381425/566877641/-1643438963?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjZWY2M2YtZDU4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eJCZBszNkPaKsv73EUlurE2yIg4V8SeQ90d8ayuUe-o=&emci=d6945e6f-be86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ccef63f-d586-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22486556) Vote early in person or by mail. Early voting is underway for the CD 11 September 9th election, and starts on September 19th for the statewide elections. You have the power to make a positive change for your family, the workers who keep our state and nation running, and for the future of democracy. As you attend barbeques or block parties this weekend, remember the folks who keep our communities running- keep in mind our workforce, our labor brothers and sisters. Happy Labor Day! Kindest regards,
---

**Opportunities** **Celebrate African Diaspora Heritage Month on September 9** Members of the Virginia General Assembly cordially invite you to join us for a day of celebration and cultural reflection at the Capitol of Virginia to celebrate African Diaspora Heritage Month on September 9, 2025. Virginia became one of the first states to officially recognize September as African Diaspora Heritage Month in 2022. This annual celebration honors the rich cultural, historical, and economic contributions of people of African descent from around the world. This is a unique opportunity to connect with elected leaders, honor cultural contributions across the diaspora, and engage communities from across Virginia in the legislative experience. This initiative is designed to support active and reservist women, women veterans, and military or veteran women spouses who are interested in entrepreneurship or expanding their small businesses. In the pilot year, twenty-two business owners started the program and nineteen completed it. In collaboration with our community partners, SBSD will offer a comprehensive instructor-guided virtual curriculum at no cost to participants. This curriculum includes specialized training, workshops, and seminars that cover essential skills needed to succeed in owning and growing small businesses within the Commonwealth. The program experienced notable success, with participants actively engaging in weekly seminars and providing positive feedback on the business training materials and curriculum clarity. The virtual format was well-received, offering participants the flexibility to review missed content. **Applications are due by Friday, September 12, 2025 at 5:00 p.m.** For more details, please visit [https://sbsd.virginia.gov/vs2b2/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381442/566877662/-1330290507?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjZWY2M2YtZDU4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eJCZBszNkPaKsv73EUlurE2yIg4V8SeQ90d8ayuUe-o=&emci=d6945e6f-be86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ccef63f-d586-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22486556)or contact [vetsupport@sbsd.virginia.gov](mailto:vetsupport@sbsd.virginia.gov). **Dream Project Mentoring Program**

The Dream Project has announced that [applications are now open for its 2025-2026 Mentoring Program](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381443/566877663/1149859548?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjZWY2M2YtZDU4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eJCZBszNkPaKsv73EUlurE2yIg4V8SeQ90d8ayuUe-o=&emci=d6945e6f-be86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ccef63f-d586-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22486556), offering Virginia high school seniors the chance to be paired with mentors who assist with exploring educational pathways, navigating the college application and scholarship process, and expanding personal and professional networks. The program, which runs from September 9, 2025 through March 31, 2026, also calls on professionals interested in guiding immigrant students through these milestones to [apply as mentors](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381444/566877664/315394036?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjZWY2M2YtZDU4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eJCZBszNkPaKsv73EUlurE2yIg4V8SeQ90d8ayuUe-o=&emci=d6945e6f-be86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ccef63f-d586-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22486556). Both students and mentors are encouraged to take part in this impactful opportunity to support college-bound seniors. Find more information [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381445/566877665/1502858227?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNjZWY2M2YtZDU4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eJCZBszNkPaKsv73EUlurE2yIg4V8SeQ90d8ayuUe-o=&emci=d6945e6f-be86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ccef63f-d586-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22486556).

clean_body: | | | Boysko Bulletin: Happy Labor Day! Dear Peter, It’s Labor Day Weekend! If there has ever been a time to be aware of the important role of our labor force, it is now. The American Federation of Federal, State, and Municipal Employees (AFSME) has been especially under attack since January. Quoting President of AFSME Lee Saunders: “The matters more than ever as billionaires and their yes-men in Congress are slashing wages, and silencing working people. Even though working people are the backbone of our economy, “they’re getting squeezed by CEOs and anti-worker politicians who want to hand out tax breaks to the billionaire class at the , , and our communities,” Saunders said. You have a chance today to use your voice. VOTE! These elections have consequences and can show the rest of the nation that change is possible. As you know, I support the Democratic slate of candidates, including Abigail Spanberger for Governor, Ghazala Hashmi for Lt. Governor and Jay Jones for Attorney General, in addition to our Democratic slate of candidates for the House of Delegates. My choice of candidates is far more than blind faith in a political party. It’s recognizing that the goals of the democratic candidates reflect my values. Government can work for all Virginians, not just the wealthy and not just those who’ve traditionally been in power at the expense of regular working people. Businesses can prosper when everyone has the opportunity for a world-class education, to make the most of their talents, and to succeed in their employment. We work to ensure that our most vulnerable Virginians will not be left behind. We work for a Virginia that is affordable - so everyone can afford medical care, housing, food, transportation, childcare, and eldercare. We work for a safe Virginia - our families should not fear for their children’s lives when they send them off to school. We work for a Virginia with clean air, clean water, and safe food. We work for a Virginia where people have access to healthcare, including abortion and birth control. We work for communities that are vibrant and diverse and welcoming. We work for the preservation of freedom of speech and democracy. You have the power to choose your leaders. Know what the candidates stand for. And vote your values. On September 9, those of us who live in Congressional District 11 will elect a representative to succeed the late Congressman Gerry Connolly. I am strongly supporting James Walkinshaw. Then on November 4, we will vote for a new Governor, Lt. Governor, and Attorney General. Vote early in person or by mail. Early voting is underway for the CD 11 September 9th election, and starts on September 19th for the statewide elections. You have the power to make a positive change for your family, the workers who keep our state and nation running, and for the future of democracy. As you attend barbeques or block parties this weekend, remember the folks who keep our communities running- keep in mind our workforce, our labor brothers and sisters. Happy Labor Day! Kindest regards, Jennifer B. BoyskoMember, Senate of Virginia Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) PS If you would like to support my work, please visit =. I’ve been meeting with advocates in Richmond and in my district office and virtually. Please reach out to me by email at mailto:SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov if you would like to discuss legislation. 2 Fall Elections September 9th Congressional District 11 Special Election The special election to fill the U.S. House of Representatives - 11th Congressional District vacancy created by the passing of the Honorable Gerald E. Connolly is September 9th, 2025. In-person early voting will continue through Saturday, September 6. Only residents of the 11th Congressional District are eligible to vote. Transportation Updates New Northern Virginia Transportation Authority Website | | was built to be accessible to all audiences, providing resources for our entire community to explore NVTA's multimodal investments, keep up with NVTA initiatives, stay informed about meetings & events, and much more. Capital Bikeshare Expands in Innovation Center Metro Station CommunityProof of Citizenship Now Required to Board Domestic Flights and Enter Federal Facilities The Fairfax County Department of Transportation has just expanded the county’s Capital Bikeshare network with the addition of 10 new stations and the delivery of 70 new electric bicycles to the countywide bikeshare fleet. The expansion includes bikeshare stations at the Innovation Center Metro Stations and within the surrounding communities at the following locations: Innovation Center Metro South Entrance (along Carta Way)Carta Way and Sayward BoulevardCoppermine Road and River Birch RoadDulles Technology Drive and Sunrise Valley DriveMcNair Farms Drive and Thomas Jefferson DriveWoodland Park Road and Cooperative Way For detailed information on constituent services offered by my office, see my website, . Information available includes: Resources for Those Impacted by DOGE Additional Resources for Federal Employees Facing Unemployment Help Paying Bills Transportation Discounts: 50% Off Metrorail and Metrobus for SNAP Recipients Reach Out for Mental Health Support - Addiction Recovery Know Your Rights - Resources for Immigrants Opportunities Celebrate African Diaspora Heritage Month on September 9 Members of the Virginia General Assembly cordially invite you to join us for a day of celebration and cultural reflection at the Capitol of Virginia to celebrate African Diaspora Heritage Month on September 9, 2025. Virginia became one of the first states to officially recognize September as African Diaspora Heritage Month in 2022. This annual celebration honors the rich cultural, historical, and economic contributions of people of African descent from around the world. This is a unique opportunity to connect with elected leaders, honor cultural contributions across the diaspora, and engage communities from across Virginia in the legislative experience. To join the celebration, please RSVP here:: Tuesday, September 9, 2025; Time: 9:00 am (please try to arrive by 8:30 am to make time for security)Location: Virginia Capitol Building: 1000 Bank St, Richmond, VA 23218Attire: Cultural and/or Business Webinar: Cognitive Decline and Financial Exploitation The Virginia Bankers Association shared the opportunity to watch a free Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) webinar on protecting older adults from financial exploitation this Thursday, September 4 from 1 pm - 2 pm. and gain insights about identifying cognitive decline and how it increases vulnerability to financial exploitation. The webinar will also include resources for financial caregivers taking care of a loved one experiencing cognitive decline. Additional Resources: Virginia She Served Business Builder Initiative The Virginia Department of Small Business and Supplier Diversity (SBSD) is pleased to announce the second year of our state-wide veteran initiative: The Virginia She Served Business Builder (VS2B2). This initiative is designed to support active and reservist women, women veterans, and military or veteran women spouses who are interested in entrepreneurship or expanding their small businesses. In the pilot year, twenty-two business owners started the program and nineteen completed it. In collaboration with our community partners, SBSD will offer a comprehensive instructor-guided virtual curriculum at no cost to participants. This curriculum includes specialized training, workshops, and seminars that cover essential skills needed to succeed in owning and growing small businesses within the Commonwealth. The program experienced notable success, with participants actively engaging in weekly seminars and providing positive feedback on the business training materials and curriculum clarity. The virtual format was well-received, offering participants the flexibility to review missed content. Applications are due by Friday, September 12, 2025 at 5:00 p.m. For more details, please visit contact mailto:vetsupport@sbsd.virginia.gov. Dream Project Mentoring Program The Dream Project has announced that , offering Virginia high school seniors the chance to be paired with mentors who assist with exploring educational pathways, navigating the college application and scholarship process, and expanding personal and professional networks. The program, which runs from September 9, 2025 through March 31, 2026, also calls on professionals interested in guiding immigrant students through these milestones to . Both students and mentors are encouraged to take part in this impactful opportunity to support college-bound seniors. Find more information . Keep in Touch** I am back in District 38 with my Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, and aides, Kathy Shupe, Juliet Morro and Aditi Goel. For constituent services and to schedule meetings with your community group, please call (703) 437-0086 or email Senator Boysko@senate.virginia.gov. name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: A few hours
body:
| | Hi Peter, it’s Marie again. I know we’ve spent a lot of time this week talking about what my national Republicans and special interests are doing, but with just a few hours to go before our [end-of-month deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381509/566877969/497279752?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_250831_3_12&refcode2=d80b7183-d786-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODBiNzE4My1kNzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zcJb-G7Xo3I9DjiyBt7zNnsKLZiTxhPo1LD7mSgKq-8=), I wanted to take a quick moment to talk about the great work we’re doing.

I’m working hard to support our rural communities, invest in the woods of Southwest Washington, and talk to voters across the district about the issues they face in their day-to-day lives.

I ran for Congress because I understand the issues of Southwest Washington and rural communities all over the country. We often get overlooked, but I’m fighting to change that.

Your help is critical to making sure we have what it takes to succeed in this race.

I still need a few more supporters to step up and help close our August fundraising gap before midnight. Can you be one of them?

[https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/august](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381510/566877970/497279752?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_250831_3_12&refcode2=d80b7183-d786-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODBiNzE4My1kNzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zcJb-G7Xo3I9DjiyBt7zNnsKLZiTxhPo1LD7mSgKq-8=)

Thanks so much!

– Marie

---
|
* * *
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114381511/566877971/-1644157728?amount=25&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_250831_3_12&refcode2=d80b7183-d786-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODBiNzE4My1kNzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zcJb-G7Xo3I9DjiyBt7zNnsKLZiTxhPo1LD7mSgKq-8=)

name: Josh
subject: (no subject)
body:
Hi Peter,
I’m reaching out one last time before tonight’s deadline because I need your help. We’re still $3,500 short of our goal, and time is running out.
Falling short isn’t an option — not with Trump and MAGA targeting this district as one of their top pickup opportunities.
**If we hit our goal, I can greenlight our organizers and keep us competitive. If we don’t, we risk falling behind right out of the gate.**

name: Yvette Martinez
subject: Bumping for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Hi there -- did you see the email below?As Executive Director of the California Democratic Party, I am leading the charge to reorient and relaunch our entire operation around passing Proposition 50.
It’s hard work. But our team is working around the clock to make it happen faster than ever before. We’re hiring organizers, printing literature, launching voter outreach, restarting our Voter Protection Hotline, and so much more.
We didn’t know this election would be happening at the start of this year. Or even at the start of this month.
That’s why we need your help. We’re hoping to raise another $3,450.76 before midnight tonight. Will you use my personal ActBlue link to donate below?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25-redistricting?refcode=20250831_FR_45DO_Prop50Fwd&amount=50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25-redistricting?refcode=20250831_FR_45DO_Prop50Fwd&amount=50]
Thank you,
Yvette
----- Forwarded message -----
From: CADEM HQ
Date: Sat, Aug 30, 2025 at 11:07AM
Subject: a new election that we didn’t budget for
As you might have already heard : California will now officially vote on Proposition 50 in a special on November 6th.
This must-win ballot measure asks voters to approve Gov. Gavin Newsom’s Stop Election Rigging Response Act, which neutralizes efforts by Trump and Texas Republicans to rig the 2026 Midterm elections .
Donald Trump and Republicans thought they had the perfect plan to rig the 2026 Elections by taking a crayon to maps in Texas and other red states and eliminating Democratic seats.
If we pass Proposition 50, we will foil their plot and position Democrats to retake the U.S. House.
But that means winning an *unexpected* election in just over two months — with ballots dropping even sooner. We have to get mobilization operations rolling faster than ever. Will you rush an emergency donation right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25-redistricting?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25-redistricting?refcode=&amount=]This is a must-win ballot measure for Democrats to have a fair shot at retaking the House Majority.
But this is a new election that we didn’t plan for or budget for...
The entire California Democratic Party is urgently reorienting our strategy, planning, and organizing efforts to pass this ballot initiative. That includes:
1️⃣ Hiring organizers;
2️⃣ Printing literature;
3️⃣ Relaunching our Voter Protection Hotline;
...And more!
But this effort isn’t cheap, and with ballots dropping in just a matter of weeks, we have zero time to spare.
That’s why we are reaching out for an emergency donation. Will you pitch in $20.25 or more so we can pass Proposition 50 and keep our mission to take back the U.S. House alive? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]

— The California Democratic Party

Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.

name: Deadline Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Have you made a triple-matched donation yet?
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
With polls in Virginia tightening, Texas Republicans passing rigged maps, and Trump continuing his authoritarian assaults, the DLCC’s work to elect state Democrats is more important than ever. | | |
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfpou14vg63v47nvcn6akb286aoalm7htbvvtpf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth60o72clh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4vrva3e7t8basj62jriclj7u0pdfvrvq5sknq30_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth60o72clh2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr50aim2ij006h33b138v5tlklfv5lelo4ue5qj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth60o72clh2bs)

__
---

---

Thank you and God bless you,
---

name: Berbalean Health
subject: The Quiet Weight Loss Trend Sweeping the Country
body:
Reactivate fat loss with GLP1

It's not celebrities.

It's not influencers.

And it's definitely not another fad diet.

The people losing the most weight right now are everyday Americans — moms, dads, teachers, and grandparents — who stumbled on a little-known "Golden Switch" that reactivates fat-burning deep inside their cells.

* A mom of three slipped back into jeans she hadn't worn in 15 years.

* A retired firefighter dropped 41 pounds and says he feels more energized than he did in his 30s.

* A 62-year-old grandmother lost 36 pounds and now runs circles around her grandkids.

The best part? Almost nobody knows about it yet.

body:

[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvdlec7uu86fbd56maftalf27d5j74crcej5djbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth68pr1chh2bs) Dear Fellow Patriot Warriors,

**Are you as FURIOUS as I am?**

The fake news media and the corrupt deep state are in FULL PANIC MODE because **I'm exposing their slimy schemes and RESHAPING President Trump's administration from the inside out!**

That's right--outlets like **Wired** , **Politico** , **Washington Post** , and the rest of the press are screaming about how "**Laura Loomer is leading the charge to PURGE disloyal traitors "** from the National Security Council, FDA, NSA, and beyond.

**For the mainstream media, I 've become a headline of upheaval within the White House.**

For the government officials who are undermining Trump's agenda, **I 've become their biggest threat.**

But I need your help to keep researching and investigating. [**Please donate today to help me keep going.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zasto4ols1mgvhugm8h7hk0j4kpj9cfe1s7is3so_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth68pr1chh2bs)

I've been darting around the country as my small staff continues their work. I'm meeting with sources, verifying everything, and in between, when called to the Oval Office, I fly to Washington on my dime.

This is my job. I don't have a lobbying firm backed by corporate dollars. And I'm not being sponsored by anyone but hard-working Americans like you.

I know it's a lot to ask, but I'm doing this for us . . . so our nation can be strong and the president we elected can truly Make America Great Again. [**Will you help me?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z546d3tglscfr7851a272i56t49b08c3h13oltpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth68pr1chh2bs)

From blasting bureaucrats who sabotage America First to forcing out deep-state snakes, **President Trump knows I'm the tip of the spear --and he's listening to US!**

The hundreds of articles about me aren't just headlines; it's a live reporting of the **WAR that 's going on for the heart of our nation**, and **WE'RE WINNING** because of relentless fighters like YOU and me!

My explosive exposes demand non-stop digging, dangerous travel to hunt down leads, and firepower to blast the truth across X and every platform that dares to let freedom ring. **[** Without YOUR immediate support**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5s0amk77j8qh005p91o4d7tupetqfouboajhreg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth68pr1chh2bs), the enemy wins--and we CANNOT let that happen!**

**[**STAND WITH ME IN THIS BATTLE RIGHT NOW!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zodb7tqmcpe1bmsqgi1ke1hmo37akt3o4tkrtd7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth68pr1chh2bs)**

[**Chip in**$25, $50, $100, or whatever you can muster****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgf96lo42p5ad241o5pkir6pdg4i1agoomepsp28_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth68pr1chh2bs) to arm me with the resources to **CRUSH the corruption** , keep the purges rolling, and **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN --FOR REAL!**

**Let's RAGE against the machine TOGETHER! America First or BUST!**

Unleashed and Unapologetic,
Laura Loomer

body:
Don’t let this Labor Day pass without making your voice heard. Submit your response before the deadline.

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znf4lhj8of8hios5k73o38fqnimepcke5ih4js28_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth68pr6c9h2bs)As Americans fire up the grill and enjoy a well-earned day of rest this Labor Day, we cannot forget what this holiday truly represents: the dignity of hard work and the strength of our people.
It's hardworking patriots like you who built this country and continue to shape its future. [The voice of America's workers must lead the fight to defend our values and secure our nation's future.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zesfbl84ipvomr8scv5ercprpbav4300lnp08rc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth68pr6c9h2bs)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Fight Back Now
body:
Are you as FURIOUS as I am? The fake news media and the corrupt deep state are in FULL PANIC MODE because I'm exposing their slimy schemes and RESHAPING President Trump's administration from the inside out!

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl8ajin98d1llu7uf4sbgrq2r13kg68ud5cjgeq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth64or4chh2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z25ge8699b30lj2cm9oaso8ai1j0qpd3q7oslh30_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth64or4chh2bs) Dear Fellow Patriot Warriors,

**Are you as FURIOUS as I am?**

The fake news media and the corrupt deep state are in FULL PANIC MODE because **I'm exposing their slimy schemes and RESHAPING President Trump's administration from the inside out!**

That's right--outlets like **Wired** , **Politico** , **Washington Post** , and the rest of the press are screaming about how "**Laura Loomer is leading the charge to PURGE disloyal traitors "** from the National Security Council, FDA, NSA, and beyond.

**For the mainstream media, I 've become a headline of upheaval within the White House.**

For the government officials who are undermining Trump's agenda, **I 've become their biggest threat.**

But I need your help to keep researching and investigating. [**Please donate today to help me keep going.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbaukuoteqjgejg1ulqlsofsijst7perqujsivb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth64or4chh2bs)

I've been darting around the country as my small staff continues their work. I'm meeting with sources, verifying everything, and in between, when called to the Oval Office, I fly to Washington on my dime.

This is my job. I don't have a lobbying firm backed by corporate dollars. And I'm not being sponsored by anyone but hard-working Americans like you.

I know it's a lot to ask, but I'm doing this for us . . . so our nation can be strong and the president we elected can truly Make America Great Again. [**Will you help me?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcpgvsk0n8gka19e71q9ke3d5b5940rm2a6j8a1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth64or4chh2bs)

From blasting bureaucrats who sabotage America First to forcing out deep-state snakes, **President Trump knows I'm the tip of the spear --and he's listening to US!**

The hundreds of articles about me aren't just headlines; it's a live reporting of the **WAR that 's going on for the heart of our nation**, and **WE'RE WINNING** because of relentless fighters like YOU and me!

My explosive exposes demand non-stop digging, dangerous travel to hunt down leads, and firepower to blast the truth across X and every platform that dares to let freedom ring. **[** Without YOUR immediate support**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj799a5qutghntumtud7rf9ep0oogorqlrp7mjig_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth64or4chh2bs), the enemy wins--and we CANNOT let that happen!**

**[**STAND WITH ME IN THIS BATTLE RIGHT NOW!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zasmum8o3e4grbljv761q0cv7pb8di5bdvj38e4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth64or4chh2bs)**

[**Chip in**$25, $50, $100, or whatever you can muster****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk4967j5md1ibgv5gs692hvvgonn8flaopibj4p0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth64or4chh2bs) to arm me with the resources to **CRUSH the corruption** , keep the purges rolling, and **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN --FOR REAL!**

**Let's RAGE against the machine TOGETHER! America First or BUST!**

Unleashed and Unapologetic,
Laura Loomer

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zj8l3hubll2as463lqj33dm428m118v62ftlqn2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth62ob4chh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zh7p75k4037ng4mp88h0m8q0c3bauap92relh3a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth62ob4chh2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5jjas63q4vq7bjkgct9acv6nm7jmd8kqp7l6cu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth62ob4chh2bs)
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3s63n308udhihefb6de36haudkphmuna1o036ig_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth62ob4chh2bs)
__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgu4kfngmiie6f2nd9k0fksbbct7teeos3iv9cno_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth62ob4chh2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zb4j8i3mc4gkbbo47p7ctanuhmv79la50csuo6q8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth62ob4chh2bs)

# **[Sun's out, guns out: Finally, therapy even men can enjoy](http://trk.libertyledger.-G9YhM3aw)**
---
Testicle tanning.If you remember anything from Tucker Carlson’s 2022 documentary “The End of Men” — apart from my captivating monologue about the evils of “soy globalism” and why weak men make hard times — it must be the scene where an anonymous right-wing bodybuilder stands atop a rock in the desert, his arms and legs spread in the famous “Vitruvian Man” pose, a red-light machine both illuminating and obscuring his modesty.If broscience is about anything, it’s experimenting for yourself and trusting what your body tells you.

# **[3 true stories of how cancel culture works, according to Cardinal Chomali](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Cardinal Fernando Chomali speaks with ACI Prensa correspondent Julieta Villar during a January 2025 interview. / Credit: “EWTN Noticas”/Screenshot ACI Prensa Staff, Aug 31, 2025 / 07:00 am (CNA). Cardinal Fernando Chomali, the archbishop of Santiago and primate of Chile, shared three stories that reflect cancel culture and highlighted the need to cultivate humility in times of mistrust and aggression.The prelate was participating in an open meeting with students from the Catholic University of Chile, which took place at the San Joaquín campus and also featured professionals and academics.The purpose of the event was to seek spaces for encounter, using dialogue as a transformative tool.In

# **[Sisters of Life launch new website offering pro-life support, resources for women](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/gCaPF0jMxVt9be7I7vvtVA)**
---
null / Credit: David Gyung/Shutterstock CNA Staff, Aug 31, 2025 / 08:00 am (CNA). The Sisters of Life have launched a new website providing resources and support for women considering an abortion, women seeking healing after having an abortion, and women whose children have an adverse prenatal diagnosis.Vis Center is named after the Latin word “vis,” which means “force” or “power.” “As women, we know that real power is unleashed when you feel listened to,” the website states.The website includes several testimonial videos of women sharing their personal stories about finding themselves in unplanned pregnancies and the joy they found in deciding to choose life, as well as women sharing their stories of finding healing after undergoing an abortion.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/gCaPF0jMxVt9be7I7vvtVA)

# **[Live musical performance honors life and legacy of St. Teresa of Calcutta](http://trk.libertyledger.-qeiIq4tixb9iZzG93mkMQ)**
---
Soprano Catherine Wethington sings during a live performance of “Journey of Faith: A Musical Tribute to Mother Teresa” at Carnegie Hall. / Credit: Richard Termine CNA Staff, Aug 31, 2025 / 06:00 am (CNA). A live musical performance celebrating the life of St. Teresa of Calcutta will be taking center stage at the Music Center at Strathmore in Washington, D.C., on Sept. 6 after a successful performance at the historic Carnegie Hall in New York.“Journey of Faith: A Musical Tribute to Mother Teresa” highlights the life and legacy of Mother Teresa, especially her service to the poor through the order she founded — the Missionaries of Charity.

subject: I need you to know something very important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas
body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj4lo4rsk27ccb30om30m9rtqb3vtj9firujeb58_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth62ob4c9h2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z157f0qnkn9uf3q12lr7v9oeh4bq0tmd7l0b9hoo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth62ob4c9h2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z571rlisoj27ua0ugnk7eelivcs6fir9gsol1vc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth62ob4c9h2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjsb4umpona889illv32101fo18a591be1blam7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth62ob4c9h2bs)
---
Dinesh D’Souza

name: Lauren4Texas
subject: I lived the American nightmare But I still believe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lauren4TexasPO Box 21174, Roanoke, VA, 24018
body:
I’m a mom who’s sick of watching America fall apart.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo3ues2j73e6sdecasdg5kq4jai4j0clabe7jq7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth6apj4clh2bs)
---
_**Patriot**_ , I’ve been _**homeless**_. I’ve been _**trafficked**_. **I’ve walked the streets with nothing but a backpack and my kids’ names in my heart.** But I _**NEVER**_ stopped believing in _**America**_. Because while the Radical Left mocked my faith and ignored my pain... _**This country gave me a second chance.**_ I’m _**Lauren Peña**_. A working-class **Republican** mom of four.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3e1pqcovfupj49sij7m0145qemr4qja3rjdnrto_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth6apj4clh2bs)
---
A _**SURVIVOR**_. And I’m running for Congress to fight for the forgotten Americans the Left has abandoned. I've been through **hell**. I've been **abused** and **traumatized**. _**But with God beside me, this country gave me the opportunity. **_ America gave me purpose. It gave me the purpose to keep going. I founded Peña Legal Advocacy to offer free legal help to families that the system failed, just like it failed me. I testified before the Texas Legislature to reform welfare, housing, and public safety—because I LIVED the worst of it. Now I’m running to take the fight from the streets... to the halls of Congress. _**Patriot**_ , if you believe in the American Dream, I’m asking you, stand with me. [_**Every $35 you give helps me reach more voters, fight back against radical Democrat Greg Casar, and FLIP TX-35 red.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5gis4pgj31oh9241249o4rlv9lrhl073e3ndeho_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cth6apj4clh2bs)
