The primary of the Republican BET candidates for the town of Greenwich begins on Tuesday, September 2 and goes through September 7 with the main day of voting on September 9.
We have been watching the letters to the editors, the Op-Ed's and the various smear campaigns by Democrats regarding the BET and its decisions to "cut the budget on education".
Thanks for reading The Goldstein Substack! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..Q_0lNRbrZ77hihh3t4h3OZhUt8vmi58UNLoV1TgpRqE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172475929)
**Here are the facts - enrollment is down so Why should the budget increase?**
"In total, 8,392 students were enrolled in the district for the 2025-26 school year as of Friday, Superintendent Toni Jones said. Last year, GPS had 8,513 enrolled students. This has been so mis-characterized as a fear tactic to say that the Republicans of the town of Greenwich are cutting Key education resources from the school children.
What happened with the BET and the BOE was a reduction of the increase in budget not a cut to the existing budget.
_**Just because there 's inflation, does not mean the Budget should automatically increase when enrollment is down.**_
As a fiscally responsible town, one should first look at where waste can be eliminated. There was also a surplus that effectively offset some of that proposed budget increase. This has to do with Connecticut statute and concerns of if you do not use the spending with a surplus, you lose it.
What you have here are conservatives running for local Office on the BET.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/195dc36b-337f-4ccd-898e-e9843c8a08ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bottom row, left to right: Lucia Jansen*, Joe Kelly, Joe Pellegrino*, Leslie Tarkington, Middle row: Alessandra Brus, Philip Dodson, Harry Fisher*, John S Hopley. Top row: David Alfano*, Nisha Arora*, Sally Eddy Bednar* and Joshua Brown. (Source Greenwich Free Press)
**The candidates with asterix are endorsed by the Greenwich RTC.**
The bios as reported to the [LWV is here.](https://substack.com/redirect/f3507b93-c5e7-4a10-b047-b5d20d24f208?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Read them and become informed voters.
While there are two "slates" running, some of each slate includes those endorsed by the Greenwich RTC.
**What is impressive is how many Republican voters these petition candidates engaged to achieve over 1500 signatures (in such a short time) and many of those petitions included grassroots campaigning like the town dump campaigning that we like so much.**
The willingness to sign a petition demonstrates that there are Greenwich Voters that want to get active in the future of the town. While only Republicans could sign the petitions for these candidates, many unaffiliated, independent and democrats were questioned. The biggest challenge is informing the voter and these petitions may encourage those who cannot participate (due to party affiliation) to show up in November.
_**The hope is that whatever happens at the primary when it concludes on Tuesday, September 9th, the Republicans can see how they are able to mobilize, even against each other in a primary and how they will all be needed to work hard for municipal elections in November.**_
A Cautionary Tale
Those that win on the 9th should help bring a united front on the 10th as keeping Greenwich fiscally responsible and instilling parent choice and say back into their children's education. Fighting against woke progressive changes and focusing on and education program designed to make Greenwich the best school district in Connecticut is necessary to combat Toni Jones and her cohort.
So make your voices heard at the polls. Your vote counts, now and in November.
VOTING INFO - From the [Town of Greenwich](https://substack.com/redirect/fad541e0-40de-4820-aeaa-675ca375aeb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Thursday Sep 4th 8am-8pm Town Hall
Friday Sep 5th 10am-6pm Town Hall
Saturday Sep 6th 10am-6pm Town Hall
Sunday Sep 7th 10am-6pm Town Hall
**PLUS: All polling places are open on September 9 at the locations listed below.**
**ELECTION DAY November 4, 2025:**
All primaries and elections in Greenwich are open for voting between **6am and 8pm**. Each voter is assigned a polling place. Find out where you vote using our [Registration Lookup tool](https://substack.com/redirect/38d9baef-5338-4fdd-86ae-f5a0cbb58e7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

clean_body: Early Voting Begins - Tomorrow - Tuesday September 2nd | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Goldstein For Congress - Please Subscribe and also visit us at www.goldsteinforcongress.com Early Voting Begins - Tomorrow - Tuesday September 2nd | | and | Sep 1 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | The primary of the Republican BET candidates for the town of Greenwich begins on Tuesday, September 2 and goes through September 7 with the main day of voting on September 9. We have been watching the letters to the editors, the Op-Ed's and the various smear campaigns by Democrats regarding the BET and its decisions to "cut the budget on education". Thanks for reading The Goldstein Substack! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. Here are the facts - enrollment is down so Why should the budget increase? "In total, 8,392 students were enrolled in the district for the 2025-26 school year as of Friday, Superintendent Toni Jones said. Last year, GPS had 8,513 enrolled students. This has been so mis-characterized as a fear tactic to say that the Republicans of the town of Greenwich are cutting Key education resources from the school children. What happened with the BET and the BOE was a reduction of the increase in budget not a cut to the existing budget. Just because there 's inflation, does not mean the Budget should automatically increase when enrollment is down. As a fiscally responsible town, one should first look at where waste can be eliminated. There was also a surplus that effectively offset some of that proposed budget increase. This has to do with Connecticut statute and concerns of if you do not use the spending with a surplus, you lose it. What you have here are conservatives running for local Office on the BET. | | ---|---|--- Bottom row, left to right: Lucia Jansen, Joe Kelly, Joe Pellegrino, Leslie Tarkington, Middle row: Alessandra Brus, Philip Dodson, Harry Fisher, John S Hopley. Top row: David Alfano, Nisha Arora, Sally Eddy Bednar and Joshua Brown. (Source Greenwich Free Press) The candidates with asterix are endorsed by the Greenwich RTC. The bios as reported to the Read them and become informed voters. While there are two "slates" running, some of each slate includes those endorsed by the Greenwich RTC. What is impressive is how many Republican voters these petition candidates engaged to achieve over 1500 signatures (in such a short time) and many of those petitions included grassroots campaigning like the town dump campaigning that we like so much. The willingness to sign a petition demonstrates that there are Greenwich Voters that want to get active in the future of the town. While only Republicans could sign the petitions for these candidates, many unaffiliated, independent and democrats were questioned. The biggest challenge is informing the voter and these petitions may encourage those who cannot participate (due to party affiliation) to show up in November. The hope is that whatever happens at the primary when it concludes on Tuesday, September 9th, the Republicans can see how they are able to mobilize, even against each other in a primary and how they will all be needed to work hard for municipal elections in November. A Cautionary Tale Those that win on the 9th should help bring a united front on the 10th as keeping Greenwich fiscally responsible and instilling parent choice and say back into their children's education. Fighting against woke progressive changes and focusing on and education program designed to make Greenwich the best school district in Connecticut is necessary to combat Toni Jones and her cohort. So make your voices heard at the polls. Your vote counts, now and in November. VOTING INFO - From the Tuesday Sep 2nd 8am-8pm - Town Hall Wednesday Sep 3rd10am-6pm Town Hall Thursday Sep 4th 8am-8pm Town Hall Friday Sep 5th 10am-6pm Town Hall Saturday Sep 6th 10am-6pm Town Hall Sunday Sep 7th 10am-6pm Town Hall PLUS: All polling places are open on September 9 at the locations listed below. ELECTION DAY November 4, 2025: All primaries and elections in Greenwich are open for voting between 6am and 8pm. Each voter is assigned a polling place. Find out where you vote using our . Voting takes place in the following locations. Click on a polling place for a google map: District 1, 1A - District 2 - District 3 - District 4, 4A - District 5, 5A - District 6, 6A - District 7, 7A - District 8 - District 9 - District 10 - District 11, 11A - * District 12 - Thanks for reading The Goldstein Substack! name: Adam
subject: This is all very overwhelming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f1a8051d7ddd483cac7e7389872869e5&_e=pQzrrSATM8bNEtu94iWSY2Zz-npjncw1Vx2d5AcAe6n4V6R1uQxNqCNnLZo2SuNzwmTqXpgIb-8jYqd0F8SgPxQ5Sd_ZdwSwMBnIiUOrWxhXSxmU8O7ss9QmOUevrMcpIyQX57Omxo5FM0SjZ9RaVcmY4wM53LNgqqXzyL_HMnW4jIoRDtZnmcOHAZ-462eyW3DMeqR8ahkS7RSBdAdWyJwXOMzFM8fm_SUbBjXckpf8Gyh3Vu3LndjPPqYl0c_-iRlhNIlXiwEW9DWNeq0ZfNXK2kMUfkb712p3_W8mb7UD4cK0H1cJXgXRux3DN15X3FZjvKv3fFO3RbBy3ZVYKBHLnzIqpeUTOU7GEiUb1knbP7FmtSrAK0k7ZF-Dap3-ejhc8wkOk3lsrT1wp3_TGRMA646RXedQztgpF-krKlx6HaoshFI7Ku_Z36i2yL5PBp6bXTf_D-sfbLG7PjazV72x8adZTiTPt6qPA2qo3eHyXjx4oP8p7qx0L2fnX0CiWa_qMJ7-w6sUh_GS_XUfqrhD3pRoi8hn-549Tcw0mCZaK5jd8sXLY1ubzjQPqsEEWjKr1wAeDFWDiX1uTfGVcr7qZjaxVihkKXf58_UMPwz6NeWjlkHoLrODI_Rxp2wXphBE0ire246a3wCdFiSS2EVe_F_MCvXNMY0fiPytdRT9F7JTRv4pMfs-JdhFypJVGG-hFp3JNeRgBfUn1lPcOgZORNOgTtSDDXg48fuAXgTHOuoje2Zci0wZnbA-7JUIDDTvmmitMWMxcaF49Wv1sa69eSnw76Fd9oSlF3Si330%3D)

---
Peter,

You may not know me yet, but my name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a lifelong Minnesotan, former Navy SEAL, and Marine Corps veteran running for U.S. Senate in 2026. I’m stepping into this fight because Minnesota—and our country—needs a new voice to stand up for our values, and I’m asking for your help to make it happen.

I grew up in Bloomington, Minnesota, playing hockey and learning teamwork from my working-class parents. _**On my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after 9/11, I enlisted in the Marine Corps to serve our nation.**_

**Over 21 years, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries as a Marine and Navy SEAL, putting my life on the line to defend our freedoms.** I earned my undergraduate degree from the University of Minnesota, a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But at my core, I’m a regular guy who wants to make my mom proud and fight for the Minnesota I love.

Right now, Minnesota and America face a critical moment. The radical policies of Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—who’s running to replace retiring Senator Tina Smith—threaten our way of life. From the unrest in Minneapolis in 2020 to attacks on our police, their agenda doesn’t reflect the Minnesota I know. _**This open Senate seat in 2026 is our chance to take back our state and stop the left’s push toward extremism. Just like in Georgia, where one seat flipped the Senate majority in 2021, Minnesota’s vote could decide the future of the U.S. Senate.

**_ **But here’s the challenge: I’m a new face, and the Democrats are already raising millions to keep this seat.** I’ve noticed you haven’t been active lately, Peter, and I get it—the news can feel overwhelming, and it’s easy to think the fight’s already won. But it’s not. Right now, donations are slowing, and the other side is **quietly building its war chest**. I’m thinking of patriots like you who’ve supported conservatives before. Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters.

**[I’m asking for just $5 today.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f1a8051d7ddd483cac7e7389872869e5&_e=pQzrrSATM8bNEtu94iWSY2Zz-npjncw1Vx2d5AcAe6n4V6R1uQxNqCNnLZo2SuNzwmTqXpgIb-8jYqd0F8SgPxQ5Sd_ZdwSwMBnIiUOrWxhXSxmU8O7ss9QmOUevrMcpIyQX57Omxo5FM0SjZ9RaVcmY4wM53LNgqqXzyL_HMnW4jIoRDtZnmcOHAZ-462eyW3DMeqR8ahkS7RSBdAdWyJwXOMzFM8fm_SUbBjXckpf8Gyh3Vu3LndjPPqYl0c_-iRlhNIlXiwEW9DWNeq0ZfNXK2kMUfkb712p3_W8mb7XifymNieYvG_ph1aH6U2rnvF_GaWEB2ON70aCYffDM1yE89qHzgMQwUFmxmrdWisbpwlAYl0CSx9K7cjrAbu6tHKpmOhA9CJAajM-J3f1GTQOL2ubyu28_VjHQVkGf4bGstLiH2rtObEXI3N0GKGSHMCCmLLbtFwy3X5n_5riYxk499_iAr_JMNf_ZZrUotq3loixc96cIg_7LspEUm0EnQqiY7A21eEYy4HAmkhYm2rIiK82K-pajmropYgorLsn0WBek8T3Z2h5RL-jk9ZuGi9_VGJQ1GpRWgjjkKgUj1qlhj9DFWUFKPJC2pK8s6Q410QmQZa2oKVpwqiLSQKvmNqAMLXFBj-B8koYhGtXTOHs4SipgqkxThcZZKIa1MTyhF3iqmQhi5derPMonop4bqaLQFvlkxgfwgWLMnlaOm4de_BdFLkrXHlf_7ia2MICgHcDuJHrfKb1ANY6NOxL3COEx2ssSUcp4nqsZqbZHfjaBzHWxlI7tbSZLKb-uQnQ%3D)** It’s not about the amount—it’s a signal that you’re with me, that you believe Minnesota and America deserve a conservative fighter who’s served our nation and will serve you in Washington.

As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. We need thousands of grassroots supporters, _**not Hollywood elites or mega-donors like the Democrats rely on.**_

[**CHIP IN $5
**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f1a8051d7ddd483cac7e7389872869e5&_e=pQzrrSATM8bNEtu94iWSY2Zz-npjncw1Vx2d5AcAe6n4V6R1uQxNqCNnLZo2SuNzwmTqXpgIb-8jYqd0F8SgPxQ5Sd_ZdwSwMBnIiUOrWxhXSxmU8O7ss9QmOUevrMcpIyQX57Omxo5FM0SjZ9RaVcmY4wM53LNgqqXzyL_HMnW4jIoRDtZnmcOHAZ-462eyW3DMeqR8ahkS7RSBdAdWyJwXOMzFM8fm_SUbBjXckpf8Gyh3Vu3LndjPPqYl0c_-iRlhNIlXiwEW9DWNeq0ZfNXK2kMUfkb712p3_W8mb7XxSqCEICRE8h4-1X8QFMJaDwSG9bveJzCzj6nCZFgApo_VzbX7KzQPUyz5e1m0PJDFc53825ttXvjpzFPQ3dMCBEFKlev12lBJwXWOV41FFsRL_xpz2o9mO872tAoARAFQUqT-EFju2yPdwwhAkdKNJ1BMyiW5TACFTaGDsFM-V8kk0kaoEOqJvvHP9RFjHhlKQKoAEnIMmnn0-e-QesesIWhDRpDgQtv26v0VPKVnRmisgoA_Ne8V9cw_eMrZ40pyRPxv5_5kRWWX8QmJYOdwhAU4Bjs-3boJ52Dzw37XG6azBRa2mIRJ1mQ3Hd8wi_WqVLRaeOGUjjXKlRD-8UwGblAoomKPo6Q5l9CBuAY3Qz8Wz9Hh1zeKdge2yr2DA_UcukOAuZtPAxgCAscdify2zhVKvnycuOKGET9hr_ZO1arG3iCDSTQivP0wMcF3uerB1qlMn6bDRBw1IHMLiZGieyvH8HkwFzIpxjVvOE3LoUMJ8yFVV3tTzqCeMl5Pku4%3D)
**Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican for president since 1976, but this race is winnable.** I’m running to secure our borders, support law enforcement, revive our economy, and protect our freedoms. Please, chip in $5 today to help me introduce myself to Minnesotans and fight for our shared values.

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer
Marine Corps Veteran
Proud Minnesotan **_

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f1a8051d7ddd483cac7e7389872869e5&_e=pQzrrSATM8bNEtu94iWSY2Zz-npjncw1Vx2d5AcAe6n4V6R1uQxNqCNnLZo2SuNzwmTqXpgIb-8jYqd0F8SgPxQ5Sd_ZdwSwMBnIiUOrWxhXSxmU8O7ss9QmOUevrMcpIyQX57Omxo5FM0SjZ9RaVcmY4wM53LNgqqXzyL_HMnW4jIoRDtZnmcOHAZ-462eyW3DMeqR8ahkS7RSBdAdWyJwXOMzFM8fm_SUbBjXckpf8Gyh3Vu3LndjPPqYl0c_-iRlhNIlXiwEW9DWNeq0ZfNXK2kMUfkb712p3_W8mb7UEQYOug-61v5SqZvfagqc0VO9K6Uy4jN1qe_Tklc-08fx_ItgxcVvOsWvgMKlaj06dBsJnkkJ9SVed71rD2RwsLp5UDP9IYf_YCNt0gj8IxEDLmfumqXTdCFyeCvtPM0Qc0kABHE-lTIcIyai8J4mM6ncIM8E5wIkGzLlbjZc0dnSqac7UgauSWvvRzWk0En0jJfST_Xa_mrT6OWX3vakFPZ20ahi_MtQvFxd5qoTbKlBxvDZ2peUOragzCeUlzxg1YaXyQbvJS6RilEwOHfgUd3-aydlY_2djWanJqBZb_RNzNSmv7x8T05vDtpfXgcKXyfI7_Zb18a0wJvNF3nuuPiBlSA1y_V5qFrxn9JEo34GH56w1FhWXiTBKrUMzkS_GsfAe0nSdarfiie3qKO2kiYF1nxbvHN41pYMO06m-YDJED47ArfdkmwIGgX5DQjWGtLU3HwOuS7slU2ZNZqfvRbg5d_a9Kx7u0LhhxrCTmmx-jSUjYqj-m8z0fNr-dHU%3D)

I earned my undergraduate degree from the University of Minnesota, a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But at my core, I’m a regular guy who wants to make my mom proud and fight for the Minnesota I love. Right now, Minnesota and America face a critical moment. The radical policies of Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—who’s running to replace retiring Senator Tina Smith—threaten our way of life. From the unrest in Minneapolis in 2020 to attacks on our police, their agenda doesn’t reflect the Minnesota I know. This open Senate seat in 2026 is our chance to take back our state and stop the left’s push toward extremism. Just like in Georgia, where one seat flipped the Senate majority in 2021, Minnesota’s vote could decide the future of the U.S. Senate. But here’s the challenge: I’m a new face, and the Democrats are already raising millions to keep this seat. I’ve noticed you haven’t been active lately, Peter, and I get it—the news can feel overwhelming, and it’s easy to think the fight’s already won. But it’s not. Right now, donations are slowing, and the other side is quietly building its war chest. I’m thinking of patriots like you who’ve supported conservatives before. Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters. It’s not about the amount—it’s a signal that you’re with me, that you believe Minnesota and America deserve a conservative fighter who’s served our nation and will serve you in Washington. As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. We need thousands of grassroots supporters, not Hollywood elites or mega-donors like the Democrats rely on. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican for president since 1976, but this race is winnable. I’m running to secure our borders, support law enforcement, revive our economy, and protect our freedoms. Please, chip in $5 today to help me introduce myself to Minnesotans and fight for our shared values. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114403313/566923046/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmM2ZDNjMC0zNzg3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=guE5U6OKDpNr8Q3HABJJppljBDNHNUQKBSWFmpt8LEo=&emci=c6dba6af-8982-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=cbc6d3c0-3787-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13185894) Hi Derek, I wanted to take a moment to wish you a happy Labor Day and tell you more about what the day is all about. Today, we honor the workers who make this country run and rededicate ourselves to standing strong for the union way of life. Western Pennsylvania is hallowed ground for the labor movement. We’re the people who made the steel that built America. Who built our roads and highways, who fought our country’s wars, who powered our railways, and so much more. Workers here have forged our region’s identity through blood, sweat, and tears. We’ve fought hard for our unions and have stood strong for labor rights. Remember, “without our brain and muscle, not a single wheel can turn.” But today, corporate power runs rampant, and it’s hurt our workers and hollowed out our towns. Our fight to protect unions and workers’ rights has never been more important than it is right now. I’m proud to have stood alongside the Steelworkers in the fight to form a union at the University of Pittsburgh. And I’m proud to be continuing the fight to defend workers, protect unions, and stand up to corporate power in Congress. Today, and every day, I’m dedicated to standing with the labor movement and I’m ready to keep showing up for workers and for the union way of life in Western PA. Happy Labor Day! In solidarity, Chris
---

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Happy Labor Day, Virginia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Today and every day, I stand with Virginia's workers.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114403757/566924048/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2RjNmQzYzAtMzc4Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=haJfYaJNpLQWrs_eTkrhVXMgyv0AnzyIdW5oDb1cSqE=)
_Happy Labor Day, Virginia!_ Today and every day, I stand with Virginia's workers and recognize the advocacy that brought about fairer wages, better hours, and safer working conditions for all.
But let's not dance around it: _I'm the only nominee in this race who will put our Commonwealth and our economy first._
While my opponent cheers on the President's tariffs and his attack on federal workers, I've rolled out plans to grow Virginia's economy and make Virginia more affordable. As Governor, I will focus on creating family-sustaining jobs, attracting new business investment, expanding trade opportunities, and making sure that generations to come can thrive in the Commonwealth we call home.
So, today, I hope you enjoy some time off with loved ones, and I hope you're ready for the work yet ahead to win this campaign and move our Commonwealth in the right direction.
Thanks for your continued support,
Abigail Spanberger

name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: 🤔 Thinking Threads: Don't Miss Vikram's Latest Thoughts 💭
body:
Catch up on my current insights and analyses.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mansharamani/vikram-update-september2025?e=93b2c2b824)
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=499c9f1a4e&e=93b2c2b824)
| | | | | |
# Thinking Threads
---
| | August proved busier than hoped in many ways, including speaking engagements, travel to see clients, and addressing the challenges of freezing pizza on hot humid summer days. Nevertheless, I did reflect on the possibility of Albertan independence, DEI dynamics, pepperoni politics, nuclear power on the moon, and the possibility of lower interest rates. Links to my pieces about these topics are below.
I also want to draw special attention to an episode of the [**World’s Greatest Business Thinkers**](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=d6993e8f12&e=93b2c2b824) podcast in which I share many of my thoughts about how to spot opportunities and identify risks in today’s uncertain environment. See below for more details.
Happy September!
[ _B_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=e43000cd4d&e=93b2c2b824) _est,**
Vikram**_

---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=58ec936b0e&e=93b2c2b824)
| | AUGUST 31, 2025
Last week, I was in Alberta, Canada to give a keynote speech at the Energy Business Forum organized by the [Canadian Energy Executive Association (CEEA)](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=1d2155d2e8&e=93b2c2b824). It gave me a chance to speak with fellow speakers Rick Perry, the former Governor of Texas and former U.S. Secretary of Energy, and Danielle Smith, the Premier of the Province of Alberta. I also had an opportunity to speak with business leaders, representatives of First Nations, as well as current and former government officials. And even though this wasn’t my first trip to the province (I’ve been dozens of times and count the Calgary Stampede as one of my favorite events...anywhere in the world!), I was again struck by the gracious people, clean air, and stunning beauty.
And potential. I mean **LOTS** of potential...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=7bf64293eb&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=03d329aa93&e=93b2c2b824)
| | AUGUST 24, 2025
As an academic, author, consultant, entrepreneur, and corporate board member, I have long understood that federal regulations and government overreach were burdening businesses, but as the CEO of a food manufacturing business, I have a specific example worth highlighting.
Consider pepperoni. Goodwell Foods makes private label frozen pizzas for some of the largest retailers in the country and pepperoni pizza is our biggest seller. We will produce millions of pizzas this year and we will use hundreds of thousands of pounds of pepperoni. Because we buy our pepperoni as finished product, it comes to us after it’s been inspected and cured. It’s ready to eat and has been...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=52eae54e5b&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=3ea54110fc&e=93b2c2b824)
| | AUGUST 17, 2025
Those who have followed my work know that I unapologetically believe business leaders should focus on generating and increasing profits. Pursuing other objectives, like prioritizing social goals, inevitably leads to confused policies, unnecessary inefficiency, and management distraction – which in aggregate, leads to loss of potential profits.
Of late, a major distraction from the focus of profits was the pursuit of social priorities via environmental, social, and governance (ESG) and diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) policies. I have been a vocal critic of such efforts, arguing that all of us pay for such distractions via higher costs and, for owners of the businesses involved, lower profits. I have actively [fought](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=fecb67b7fb&e=93b2c2b824) against these efforts when I served on corporate...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=83da62fa28&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=c2a23a2afd&e=93b2c2b824)
| | AUGUST 10, 2025
Transportation Secretary and interim NASA Administrator Sean Duffy recently revealed the Administration’s [plans to build a nuclear reactor on the Moon](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=063e9c1405&e=93b2c2b824). For anyone who may doubt that we’re currently in the middle of a new space race, it’s time to acknowledge reality: geopolitical competition has already moved beyond Earth.
While the idea of nuclear power on the moon isn’t new (NASA has kicked around this [idea](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=2edde1d50d&e=93b2c2b824) before), the upcoming announcement will likely contain a specific timeline. The US is aiming to build a 100-kilowatt nuclear reactor on the Moon by 2030. The reactor being developed will produce [enough electricity to power about 80 homes](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=28ffe1a023&e=93b2c2b824).
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=2e3038b55a&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=e9833e7fdd&e=93b2c2b824)
| | AUGUST 3, 2025
Markets were shaken on Friday when the newly [released](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=1c5b1ba850&e=93b2c2b824) jobs report announced that only 73,000 jobs were created in July. This is down from the 115,000 expected and is another indicator confirming the economy is weakening. If there is any doubt of the slowdown, revisions to jobs data for previous months dispelled that belief. The May and June payroll numbers were [**revised**](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=3aad5100ab&e=93b2c2b824)**down by 258,000** to 19,000 and 14,000 jobs, respectively. And while these revisions are much smaller than 800,000 job [revision](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=7ad8b2e6d9&e=93b2c2b824)that took place last year, they help explain the growing gap between economic perceptions and realities.
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=d1176baddd&e=93b2c2b824)

More importantly, we discussed how my framework and methodology of connecting seemingly disparate dots can reveal hidden opportunities and identify lurking risks. Please have a listen!

# NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
---
| | As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos.
If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing! (**It’s Free**!)
---

# About Vikram
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=243f7889b0&e=93b2c2b824)
| | **VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He’s currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, [ _**The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=97b1e96fea&e=93b2c2b824) , [ _**Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=2a2d877cbc&e=93b2c2b824) and [ _**Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=98a2bd89e2&e=93b2c2b824). Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

clean_body: Catch up on my current insights and analyses. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thinking Threads | | August proved busier than hoped in many ways, including speaking engagements, travel to see clients, and addressing the challenges of freezing pizza on hot humid summer days. Nevertheless, I did reflect on the possibility of Albertan independence, DEI dynamics, pepperoni politics, nuclear power on the moon, and the possibility of lower interest rates. Links to my pieces about these topics are below. I also want to draw special attention to an episode of the podcast in which I share many of my thoughts about how to spot opportunities and identify risks in today’s uncertain environment. See below for more details. Happy September! est, Vikram | | AUGUST 31, 2025 Last week, I was in Alberta, Canada to give a keynote speech at the Energy Business Forum organized by the . It gave me a chance to speak with fellow speakers Rick Perry, the former Governor of Texas and former U.S. Secretary of Energy, and Danielle Smith, the Premier of the Province of Alberta. I also had an opportunity to speak with business leaders, representatives of First Nations, as well as current and former government officials. And even though this wasn’t my first trip to the province (I’ve been dozens of times and count the Calgary Stampede as one of my favorite events...anywhere in the world!), I was again struck by the gracious people, clean air, and stunning beauty. And potential. I mean LOTS of potential... | | | | AUGUST 24, 2025 As an academic, author, consultant, entrepreneur, and corporate board member, I have long understood that federal regulations and government overreach were burdening businesses, but as the CEO of a food manufacturing business, I have a specific example worth highlighting. Consider pepperoni. Goodwell Foods makes private label frozen pizzas for some of the largest retailers in the country and pepperoni pizza is our biggest seller. We will produce millions of pizzas this year and we will use hundreds of thousands of pounds of pepperoni. Because we buy our pepperoni as finished product, it comes to us after it’s been inspected and cured. It’s ready to eat and has been... | | | | AUGUST 17, 2025 Those who have followed my work know that I unapologetically believe business leaders should focus on generating and increasing profits. Pursuing other objectives, like prioritizing social goals, inevitably leads to confused policies, unnecessary inefficiency, and management distraction – which in aggregate, leads to loss of potential profits. Of late, a major distraction from the focus of profits was the pursuit of social priorities via environmental, social, and governance (ESG) and diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) policies. I have been a vocal critic of such efforts, arguing that all of us pay for such distractions via higher costs and, for owners of the businesses involved, lower profits. I have actively against these efforts when I served on corporate... | | | | AUGUST 10, 2025 Transportation Secretary and interim NASA Administrator Sean Duffy recently revealed the Administration’s . For anyone who may doubt that we’re currently in the middle of a new space race, it’s time to acknowledge reality: geopolitical competition has already moved beyond Earth. While the idea of nuclear power on the moon isn’t new (NASA has kicked around this before), the upcoming announcement will likely contain a specific timeline. The US is aiming to build a 100-kilowatt nuclear reactor on the Moon by 2030. The reactor being developed will produce . | | | | AUGUST 3, 2025 Markets were shaken on Friday when the newly jobs report announced that only 73,000 jobs were created in July. This is down from the 115,000 expected and is another indicator confirming the economy is weakening. If there is any doubt of the slowdown, revisions to jobs data for previous months dispelled that belief. The May and June payroll numbers were by 258,000 to 19,000 and 14,000 jobs, respectively. And while these revisions are much smaller than 800,000 job took place last year, they help explain the growing gap between economic perceptions and realities. | | | | World’s Greatest Business Thinkers Podcast: Vikram Mansharamani | | Earlier this year, I had the pleasure of speaking with Nick Hague, host of the World’s Greatest Business Thinkers Podcast , about how a generalist approach can help us make sense of today overwhelming uncertainty. More importantly, we discussed how my framework and methodology of connecting seemingly disparate dots can reveal hidden opportunities and identify lurking risks. Please have a listen! | | | | | | | NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY | | As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos. name: Ms. Ogyny
subject: Labor Day will soon be about forcing women into labor
body:
This isn’t a novel. It’s not a nightmare you wake up from. It’s the America Trump and MAGA are building brick by brick. And the first brick falls this November in Pennsylvania
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JERaSRP4a1BZjBXsW7R9-QTrsuGSOLnfsiN-kuyv3Hjui8yQZsAUSqiW--8N73nw5CE--CzdfK8Ua8kXPWqAxvWYMhtFGLbOt7nx9Sa9mVSDvscqSJBUbB8wwKkMCGBjjrRuAFfbsBShmK-IPmzDNXkpGy1270pBS1ipx2ZHNuA77t5jZHGpEqmjJ8wQ_B0hIKKgpGlmdaQAg1y4jMvKqhvriawMC3r6EzuDlIjRvZw=&c=IQUr5Wi_2-dPJ-gxlbn3p9iUPpLbDe17kGwf4_MVs2fjLQvzjXeI3w==&ch=YsIsL4EBbHcjCflrWWZyqPCGvymkj1J2K6srN5InKVfZR0ZMydjo7w==)

| Peter,
Imagine Labor Day, 2029--the first year of Trump's third term.
The streets are quiet. No parades. No picket lines. No celebrations of workers' victories.
Unions are outlawed. Strikes are punished with jail. Workers clock in, keep their heads down, and pray they don't get injured -- because safety protections are gone, and complaining means losing your job.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JERaSRP4a1BZjBXsW7R9-QTrsuGSOLnfsiN-kuyv3Hjui8yQZsAUSqiW--8N73nw5CE--CzdfK8Ua8kXPWqAxvWYMhtFGLbOt7nx9Sa9mVSDvscqSJBUbB8wwKkMCGBjjrRuAFfbsBShmK-IPmzDNXkpGy1270pBS1ipx2ZHNuA77t5jZHGpEqmjJ8wQ_B0hIKKgpGlmdaQAg1y4jMvKqhVEv56S0BZOD1GKsARWQF4=&c=IQUr5Wi_2-dPJ-gxlbn3p9iUPpLbDe17kGwf4_MVs2fjLQvzjXeI3w==&ch=YsIsL4EBbHcjCflrWWZyqPCGvymkj1J2K6srN5InKVfZR0ZMydjo7w==)

| And "Labor Day"? MAGA has twisted it into something grotesque: a national holiday glorifying forced pregnancies.
Billboards line the highways: smiling mothers holding babies with slogans like "Labor is Freedom."
Pharmacies no longer carry birth control. Clinics are shuttered. Women bleed out from unsafe abortions. Husbands -- and only husbands -- cast votes for their households, while wives and daughters are voiceless by law.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JERaSRP4a1BZjBXsW7R9-QTrsuGSOLnfsiN-kuyv3Hjui8yQZsAUSqiW--8N73nw5CE--CzdfK8Ua8kXPWqAxvWYMhtFGLbOt7nx9Sa9mVSDvscqSJBUbB8wwKkMCGBjjrRuAFfbsBShmK-IPmzDNXkpGy1270pBS1ipx2ZHNuA77t5jZHGpEqmjJ8wQ_B0hIKKgpGlmdaQAg1y4jMvKqsrwW4tKfc_MRotBltzVxW8=&c=IQUr5Wi_2-dPJ-gxlbn3p9iUPpLbDe17kGwf4_MVs2fjLQvzjXeI3w==&ch=YsIsL4EBbHcjCflrWWZyqPCGvymkj1J2K6srN5InKVfZR0ZMydjo7w==)

This isn't a novel. It's not a nightmare you wake up from. It's the America Trump and MAGA are building brick by brick. And the first brick falls this November in Pennsylvania's Supreme Court retention election.
Here's what's at stake if MAGA takes control of the PA Supreme Court:
• Trump can rig the '26 and '28 elections in his favor, clearing the way for a third term.
• Trump will rewrite the PA Constitution -- outlawing reproductive healthcare and dismantling unions.
• They could silence dissent, erase women's rights, and bury democracy under the weight of their theocratic rule.
If we lose Pennsylvania, we lose the country.
Defend Our Courts is the last line of defense. But MAGA is outspending and outorganizing us in PA. That's why we are rallying democrats across the country to come to PA's aid to stop this dystopian nightmare from becoming reality.

clean_body: This isn’t a novel. It’s not a nightmare you wake up from. It’s the America Trump and MAGA are building brick by brick. And the first brick falls this November in Pennsylvania | | | | | == | Peter, Imagine Labor Day, 2029--the first year of Trump's third term. The streets are quiet. No parades. No picket lines. No celebrations of workers' victories. Unions are outlawed. Strikes are punished with jail. Workers clock in, keep their heads down, and pray they don't get injured -- because safety protections are gone, and complaining means losing your job. | | == | And "Labor Day"? MAGA has twisted it into something grotesque: a national holiday glorifying forced pregnancies. Billboards line the highways: smiling mothers holding babies with slogans like "Labor is Freedom." Pharmacies no longer carry birth control. Clinics are shuttered. Women bleed out from unsafe abortions. Husbands -- and only husbands -- cast votes for their households, while wives and daughters are voiceless by law. | == This isn't a novel. It's not a nightmare you wake up from. It's the America Trump and MAGA are building brick by brick. And the first brick falls this November in Pennsylvania's Supreme Court retention election. Here's what's at stake if MAGA takes control of the PA Supreme Court: • Trump can rig the '26 and '28 elections in his favor, clearing the way for a third term. • Trump will rewrite the PA Constitution -- outlawing reproductive healthcare and dismantling unions. • They could silence dissent, erase women's rights, and bury democracy under the weight of their theocratic rule. If we lose Pennsylvania, we lose the country. Defend Our Courts is the last line of defense. But MAGA is outspending and outorganizing us in PA. That's why we are rallying democrats across the country to come to PA's aid to stop this dystopian nightmare from becoming reality. == == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Labor Day was born from workers who bled and died for dignity and freedom. If we fail, Trump will twist it into a grotesque celebration of forced labor -- women enslaved to the state, workers stripped of every protection, democracy erased from memory. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

subject: They Fired Me from My Own Creation – Then Sued to Destroy Me
body:
A federal judge in Florida's Southern District has ordered their former Chief of Staff to face a videotaped deposition in person. He tried to block it on July 26, claiming it would embarrass him, but the court said no on August 13.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1659995/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvOUhwTkR4YTg1cQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDE/LbmNsQUJsRjQzdw/qP2hpZHM9bmNXR0tDb1J4aUc1NFdscw/gaLWhxQ/s8mf23a9778)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Dear Patriot,

This is James O'Keefe, pouring out my heart to you today.

I founded Project Veritas from nothing, **spilling my soul into it for years to expose corruption and fight for truth**.

It was my life's work, my passion. But they betrayed me – fired me without mercy, **then slapped me with a lawsuit to silence me forever**. It's been a trial of my soul, a brutal battle between good and evil that tests everything I believe in.

**They want to crush the light I bring to dark places**.

Yet, in this darkness, there's a spark of hope, [**and I need your help to keep it alive**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

A federal judge in Florida's Southern District has ordered their former Chief of Staff to face a videotaped deposition in person. He tried to block it on July 26, claiming it would embarrass him, but the court said no on August 13.

**This could reveal the rot inside, the evil that's been hidden[**, but I need to be able to cover the legal fees of this deposition, will you chip in?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**

I sincerely need your help. Depositions cost money – lawyers, travel, experts. Every dollar fights back against this injustice.

**[**Will you stand with me in this good vs. evil fight? Donate now and help expose the truth.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**

From the depths of my heart, thank you.

Stay vigilant,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Jim Marchant
subject: Honoring America’s Workers this Labor Day
body:
Nevada is strong because of the hardworking men and women who never give up
| | | | | [](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-VjY7jsVx3VdZz89VTxWXOGWsXBC6NCHuW4xgh7i5BQtEoxkQfYZ-M7boFHP_3KUCf_sY4FmdvelP9Ku88Tm4jQ7bLbdJgtbQw5rOMUvnWmSYd_ZCxA6gyzwqDtg8XcaTXX6iSGzT3tnVB4xKf-zY1TjKIWYmtl9&c=v5yhy4qMOOXg9UUeTlwpiNSqoWHjkkrR4k5XvjGS2moG1Gg3SV1VKw==&ch=7MDkYSktMB6kefeHtWYMkcrgBPi-8TRBjVzJ8tTRzWnuOm3OLg14sg==)
---
| Peter,
---
This Labor Day, we celebrate the American worker. The men and women who built this country and who keep it running every single day. From small business owners to tradesmen, farmers, and families, your hard work is the foundation of our nation. Labor Day is more than a holiday. It is a reminder that America is strong because of the values of hard work, faith, and perseverance. These are the same values that built Nevada and the same values we must protect for future generations.
---
|
---
As your representative, I will always fight for policies that put Nevada families and Nevada workers first. That means protecting good jobs, stopping reckless government spending that destroys opportunity, and keeping America the best place in the world to live, work, and raise a family. Today, we honor the backbone of America. The workers who never quit, who keep our country moving forward, and who represent the very best of who we are.
---

Jim Marchant Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress - NV01 [JimMarchant.com](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-VjY7jsVx3VdZz89VTxWXOGWsXBC6NCHuW4xgh7i5BQtEoxkQfYZ-M7boFHP_3KUCf_sY4FmdvelP9Ku88Tm4jQ7bLbdJgtbQw5rOMUvnWmSYd_ZCxA6gyzwqDtg8XcaTXX6iSGzT3tt2GkQaxwmQu36iVm6HKQE&c=v5yhy4qMOOXg9UUeTlwpiNSqoWHjkkrR4k5XvjGS2moG1Gg3SV1VKw==&ch=7MDkYSktMB6kefeHtWYMkcrgBPi-8TRBjVzJ8tTRzWnuOm3OLg14sg==)

name: Jose Javier Rodriguez
subject: Some reflections on Labor Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
Florida’s workers deserve a real advocate. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114408925/566933484/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_LaborDay_090125&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRlMjg0ZjAtM2I4Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dfG-NT7QRQQ4Z93K_aHrw7Ec0rs2a08_khYPLga_-38=&emci=4c080470-8f83-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=6de284f0-3b87-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=32374386)
---
America was built on a promise, Peter: if you work hard and play by the rules, you'll have the opportunity to get ahead. **Workers built this country, and they are the backbone of Florida.** That's why on this Labor Day, I’m thinking about every hardworking person in our state who makes our communities stronger every single day. I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for them. As a workers’ rights lawyer, I took wage theft cases to court. I stood with unions at the bargaining table. In the Legislature, I pushed to protect workers’ rights. And as Assistant Secretary of Labor under President Biden, I oversaw apprenticeship and training programs that helped people gain skills, land better jobs, and support their families. But here's what I also learned: when workers don't have someone fighting for them in our government, they get left behind. That's exactly what's happening in Florida right now under our current Attorney General. **This Labor Day, let's recommit to that original promise — that hard work and playing by the rules should be rewarded, not exploited.** Florida's workers deserve nothing less than a People's Lawyer who will fight for them every single day. **[If you're with me in this fight, I'd be grateful for your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114408929/566933521/1963674758?refcode=em_JJR_FR_LaborDay_090125&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRlMjg0ZjAtM2I4Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dfG-NT7QRQQ4Z93K_aHrw7Ec0rs2a08_khYPLga_-38=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114408932/566933523/1963674758?refcode=em_JJR_FR_LaborDay_090125&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRlMjg0ZjAtM2I4Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dfG-NT7QRQQ4Z93K_aHrw7Ec0rs2a08_khYPLga_-38=) **

clean_body: Florida’s workers deserve a real advocate. | America was built on a promise, Peter: if you work hard and play by the rules, you'll have the opportunity to get ahead. Workers built this country, and they are the backbone of Florida. That's why on this Labor Day, I’m thinking about every hardworking person in our state who makes our communities stronger every single day. I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for them. As a workers’ rights lawyer, I took wage theft cases to court. I stood with unions at the bargaining table. In the Legislature, I pushed to protect workers’ rights. And as Assistant Secretary of Labor under President Biden, I oversaw apprenticeship and training programs that helped people gain skills, land better jobs, and support their families. But here's what I also learned: when workers don't have someone fighting for them in our government, they get left behind. That's exactly what's happening in Florida right now under our current Attorney General. This Labor Day, let's recommit to that original promise — that hard work and playing by the rules should be rewarded, not exploited. Florida's workers deserve nothing less than a People's Lawyer who will fight for them every single day. = | = Happy Labor Day, Jose Javier Rodriguez | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

name: Mark @ House GOP
subject: My closed-door meeting with GOP Leadership
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206xuehd2dnss5vp61n6h69ho50h8mdjnhkkd84b3ltdmdfjzcahpr4osb60l4ld4jaenhnixlfybgl0v1p&__stmp=t1wxo7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1wxo7&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1k8e4k23dvyj7oxg2erc5fh2t2wz9sqb7lg46xhm59jzbcufwna7p21mgglpb38qq4se72cfqzdnfh8mfeu927h8aagdcmf118m285ezk20f0y37urhh1zt280a78f3coyx9mprg5w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1wxo7&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1wxo7&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1wxo7&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1wxo7&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1k8e4k23dvyj7oxg2erc5fh2t2wz9sqb7lg46xhm59jzbcufwna7p21mgglpb38qq4se72cfqzdnfh8mfeu927h8aagdcmf118m285ezk20f0y37urhh1zt280a78f3coyx9mprg5w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1wxo7&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1wxo7&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206xuehd2dnss5vp61n6h69ho50h8mdjnhkkd84b3ltdmdfjzcahpr4osb60l4ld4jaenhnixlfybgl0v1p&__stmp=t1wxo7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line.
Unsubscribe from all communications
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206xuehd2dnss5vp61n6h69ho50h8mdjnhkkd84b3ltdmdfjzcahpr4osb60l4ld4jaenhnixlfybgl0v1p&__stmp=t1wxo7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh
.

Privacy Policy
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=14oag80vul0bjwdedxvzvyotd2nntuq9kh1ajc48adkh1zyon5cza7yk6tb8j8c0t2indctts54vv4732xjv6yp2ozi9e357ze22m2u9d41bfru2rr9refnlpkbywr9nt0fnzp5rd0c5d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1wxo7&__onlt=t

body:
| | | **I’m a mom, social worker, and union leader running to defeat a MAGA Republican this November - and I need your help to expand the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates.**
******[Deliver Donald Trump and his MAGA allies a BIG DEFEAT in the next nationally-watched elections. This Labor Day, donate to help a union sister win.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6JT2e6-gM7kf7A7fsl5ASH0py4x6H9PZK97q2iRqN7xoWdUQ0kZtj6xcx5FDuICACkc3DxH28ey8XgXZd4WiLjCmdgW7Imy-qBOjyvGz9RLkVOn0Bl90pstv_EcZNUfqYSj5sqnvcbJ9s27I-pIK8_mHxEnSjb74EbZo-qU8TN6mi77hUGsuFT_0iUR5xc2uBY_eXDGUHxpNdrAIU6DlMKjkGi8A6HzViVK9PzpSgbcM/4jj/M1iDY09ESYWbcQOTxR5D9A/h0/h001.O_pduNqDGTROF0QcyKRVNmz6WoJHJmJBlixZDWpd2pI)**
* * *
This Labor Day, a huge banner of Donald Trump’s face hangs on the Department of Labor building.[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviOe6wF9anNgAGC4E18pFY-ZBBlhN0tRTSZByfbOVYbunMYh40YHB0dewQgxOr_7FEAFNOA5f0FvaYfI5eb2tgbAONbn-gKvloxSFzo9sZAt8XyhRODVfDLdLvKtX7HnPB0rl6pYo9BZniMqkXcH2pHD3kYtEy0eofnMbu7zDvMYQ2AMqua1DMeObAW7OvNQcncvubPnRfdhocoQnSZJsXijOnt3cawGvrrXwbie4eszY/4jj/M1iDY09ESYWbcQOTxR5D9A/h1/h001.K_NB1QARdy0AHm2bdAXa0JUuv9ndT3dcOqHW8_5V028)
Friend, how dare he? Trump and anti-worker MAGA Republicans are:
* Firing thousands of civil servants and stripping most of the federal workforce of their collective bargaining rights
* Slashing health care and nutrition aid for working families, all to pay for billionaire tax cuts
* Repealing regulations that protect worker safety and rights

It’s time to fight back.
With 64 days until Virginia’s elections, we’re not taking the day off.
**We’re knocking doors all weekend to GET OUT THE VOTE.**
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqdxB9B_-Pj2UssOlSG4Io0evX2PNn_AWmY41uED1Qod-cHbX4srZhtLXhbV-RGgdnleqXbY0q6inrhJWgtOLyVcJQbJ_0-jM5UJnK2Kc1MiIVuJUsBrGCjtltZh59CShJdvejGdowM8CI7LilV_j5cPGbQsScGAffeTGwLUOwBqqXxErGIxBjrIxkgA99Zt22SSNbdAZun3VnqWrY3EZitwgw3acDlMXTzzcNrQPiaz7NBFynt0r0em9--TfjvPoGTdnVKA9_4Nqr5mPIQQv8axc76EN1AgRsUpPjyMESXzo/4jj/M1iDY09ESYWbcQOTxR5D9A/h2/h001.Ygbp2B4M49v3eBNXAtyAC4gMJ-fi9_BQcGfqlWCYfCk)
As a Delegate, I carried a historic law that repealed a Jim Crow-era ban on public sector collective bargaining.
**I’m proud to be union-endorsed against a MAGA Republican, and I need your help to win.**

clean_body: | | | I’m a mom, social worker, and union leader running to defeat a MAGA Republican this November - and I need your help to expand the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. **** This Labor Day, a huge banner of Donald Trump’s face hangs on the Department of Labor building. Friend, how dare he? Trump and anti-worker MAGA Republicans are: Firing thousands of civil servants and stripping most of the federal workforce of their collective bargaining rights Slashing health care and nutrition aid for working families, all to pay for billionaire tax cuts Repealing regulations that protect worker safety and rights It’s time to fight back. With 64 days until Virginia’s elections, we’re not taking the day off. We’re knocking doors all weekend to GET OUT THE VOTE. As a Delegate, I carried a historic law that repealed a Jim Crow-era ban on public sector collective bargaining. I’m proud to be union-endorsed against a MAGA Republican, and I need your help to win. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: John Fetterman
subject: union way of life – always ✊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Happy Labor Day, Derek!

Yinz know how I feel: The Union Way of Life is *sacred.* Union workers are the backbone of our communities and our economy.

So today, I want to say thank you for everything you do. You make this country run. 🙏🇺🇸

Today, we honor the folks who fought – and are still fighting – for fair pay, safe workplaces, good benefits, and the right to organize. ✊

Because EVERYONE deserves to be in a union. 💯

Especially at a time when CEOs, corporations, and their bought-and-sold politicians are trying to divide and conquer. Nah, dude. Not on my watch. 🙅

Whether it’s nurses walking the picket line or federal workers fighting Trump’s attacks in court – union folks know I have their back:

✅ Sounding the alarm when Trump shreds union contracts
✅ Introducing bills to support striking workers
✅ Joining folks on the picket line

I'm proud to be their No. 1 advocate in the Senate.

Union workers built PA + this country. They paved the roads we drive on and built the schools we send our kids to.

So while Trump and Republicans try to push their union-busting agenda, I'll keep fighting for a future where your skills are valued the way they should be.

You can count on one thing: No CEO, no corporation, no D.C. lobbyist will ever matter more to me than a union nurse, steelworker, cement mason, plasterer, or teacher fighting for what’s right.

So on a day like today, I have to ask: If you're in this with me, will you pitch in a few bucks to help us power this grassroots movement and keep up the fight for working families in PA + across the country?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51627?t=1001&akid=10281%2E434096%2EhzOUjq

Thank you for all you do,

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=10281%2E434096%2EhzOUjq

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1003&akid=10281%2E434096%2EhzOUjq

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Confirmed: Obama made the call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call.
| Friend,
---
Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property.
---
_Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself._
---
**Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away.**
---
_In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani._
---
Why? _Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama_.
---
You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone...
---
_**...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama?**_
---
If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you?
---
As the most senior elected Republican in New York, I am making a _solemn pledge_ to you right now: I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop Mamdani and FIRE Governor Kathy Hochul who singlehandedly enabled his rise to power.
---
_That’s _my_ pledge. Now I’m entrusting _you_ with a 500% MATCH that I’ve authorized to fight back as the Obama Machine tries to install a communist mayor in the biggest city in America._

clean_body: The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call. | Friend, Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property. Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself. Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away. In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani. Why? Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama. You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone... ...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama? If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you? As the most senior elected Republican in New York, I am making a solemn pledge to you right now: I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop Mamdani and FIRE Governor Kathy Hochul who singlehandedly enabled his rise to power. That’s my pledge. Now I’m entrusting you with a 500% MATCH that I’ve authorized to fight back as the Obama Machine tries to install a communist mayor in the biggest city in America. Thank you and God Bless, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: What the heck is going on with Trump? America needs to know
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [What the heck is going on with Trump? America needs to know](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41f1a98a-4e4d-4382-bd2b-c3a54b4af0c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9655bc85-013b-4b55-94fe-5c60c2869abb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | We all know that there's been a lot of things wrong with Trump for a long, long time, but now there are very serious new questions about his medical health, and we're not getting answers. [**Add your name: "It's time for Trump to have a real examination by real doctors -- not his fawning hacks -- and for the results to be released publicly." **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te496d202-6c90-47ac-9640-83d07dd71009/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump is now disappearing for days at a time, spawning recurring rumors that he might in fact be dead. And when he does appear, it's been from a distance, and he's remained silent (when has Trump ever done that?). All kinds of symptoms are appearing, with clumsy attempts to hide them (hand makeup). His "doctors" assure us he is "fine, 100%, healthiest president ever, etc.," but these are the same clowns who've told ridiculously obvious lies about his height, weight, etc. Trump is already dangerous enough when he's healthy, but if he's seriously ill, and in a cognitive free-fall, the consequences for our nation and the world could be catastrophic. We need to know what is wrong with him, and we need to know now, so that we can respond appropriately to protect ourselves. [**Add your name: "It's time for Trump to have a real examination by real doctors -- not his fawning hacks -- and for the results to be released publicly." **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3039aa3-5307-4d26-852d-0fa99822d977/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114412550/566943592/1806897946?refcode=EM_C_250901Labor_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2MyNzgxZS00MDg3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7OMq59QYFynO74Af-v5Vq18yX-perks6qHd1MhjhsWY=) First, I want to thank you for helping me reach my fundraising goal in August. But more importantly, **I want to wish you a Happy Labor Day, Peter!**

The labor movement has endlessly worked to advance the rights of working people. While labor organizers work to secure higher wages, better benefits, and real investment in our employees, I'm fighting every day in Congress to pass pro-worker, pro-union policies.

Unfortunately, our rights are in danger as Trump works to slash worker protections, including terminating collective bargaining rights, strip away health care access, and make our lives more expensive. But I am fighting back in every way I can.

During my time in Congress, I have cosponsored legislation to protect workers against unfair trade practices, raise the minimum wage, and provide affordable healthcare. I also helped deliver $500,000 in federal funding to train local Black entrepreneurs and secured additional federal funding for economic development in Ohio.

The power of the people is in our collective strength, and I know we can create an economy that works for us all together.

Together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Labor Day
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94894/images/landsman%20logo.jpg]
,
This Labor Day, I’m thinking about the working families who built our communities and continue to make them stronger every day.
As a dad of two teenagers, I see how hard parents work to provide for their kids, often juggling multiple jobs and still struggling to make ends meet.
Too many working families are still being left behind. Parents shouldn’t have to choose between taking care of a sick child and keeping their job. Workers shouldn’t fear speaking up about unsafe conditions. And no one working full-time should struggle to afford basic necessities like housing, healthcare, or childcare.
Our economy works best when it benefits everyone – not just those at the top.
Appreciate you,
Greg

Landsman for Congress
PO Box 413
Cincinnati, OH 45201
United States

| Happy Labor Day, Peter!

At Emerge, we recognize that the labor movement plays a crucial role in ensuring a healthy democracy and protecting our fundamental rights for years to come.

_**That’s why so many of our Emerge alums are proud union members and pro-labor leaders.**_ In fact, Emerge women represent over 95 different unions – from education and trade unions to government and healthcare!

From fighting for fair wages and worker protections to affordable childcare and healthcare, Emerge women at every level are bringing labor issues to the forefront of our democracy. But we need your help to have their back, continue this vital work, and empower MORE Democratic women to run for office, win crucial races, and power our movement forward.

[_**Will you contribute $25 or more now to help Emerge recruit, train, and empower bold Democratic women to run for office in every state?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114412706/566944097/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-09-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiOWMwNDhlLTQwODctZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=epDMpi9CXc8ruJyQRVpsadjmIJ99oDsxGYssA_dLwFw=)

As we approach the landmark 250th birthday of our great nation in 2026, my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation are proud to offer a new eBook:

American Founders: Leaders at the Creation of the Republic

name: Tim Walz
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
I was a dues-paying, card-carrying member of my teachers union for years. I know firsthand how the labor movement has changed lives for the better.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114412844/566944585/2117770243?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTQxMTRmNS00MDg3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WX0x1FQKGkjvzPW1i6wn-pTJ9GTgZtqDycKMvR9p5_o=)
---
Peter,
I was a dues-paying, card-carrying member of my teachers union for years. I know firsthand how the labor movement has changed lives for the better.
In Minnesota, we’re proud to have one of the nation’s most generous paid family and medical leave policies. We’ve ensured paid sick days, expanded the right to collectively bargain, and increased worker protections.
**But we can’t take that progress for granted. **
Donald Trump and his MAGA allies want to roll back the clock, stripping away protections for workers, weakening unions, and tipping the scales toward the powerful and the ultra-wealthy. We can’t let that happen.
I’ll keep saying it: when working families are strong, Minnesota is strong.
Thanks for standing with me — and with workers — this Labor Day.

Tim Walz

name: PA Dems
subject: PA is for unions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Happy Labor Day, Peter!

**Pennsylvania is for unions — it always has been, and it always will be!** Today, we reflect on and celebrate the labor movement and the progress it has made for our workers. From the minimum wage, to safety standards, to the 40-hour work week, and more, labor unions fought to make our country stronger, and we’re better off because of their tenacity.

Here at the Pennsylvania Democratic Party, we know that unions built this country, and we must protect them. American workers deserve fair wages, safe working conditions, and elected officials who will fight _for_ them, not bet against them.

As you enjoy the day off with your friends and family, take a moment to reflect on all that the labor movement has given us — and the fight that is ahead of us.

Have a happy and safe holiday!

PA Dems

clean_body: | | Happy Labor Day, Peter! Pennsylvania is for unions — it always has been, and it always will be! Today, we reflect on and celebrate the labor movement and the progress it has made for our workers. From the minimum wage, to safety standards, to the 40-hour work week, and more, labor unions fought to make our country stronger, and we’re better off because of their tenacity. Here at the Pennsylvania Democratic Party, we know that unions built this country, and we must protect them. American workers deserve fair wages, safe working conditions, and elected officials who will fight for them, not bet against them. As you enjoy the day off with your friends and family, take a moment to reflect on all that the labor movement has given us — and the fight that is ahead of us. Have a happy and safe holiday! name: Team DNC
subject: This Labor Day:
body:
Democrats are on the side of the worker.
---
Happy Labor Day, Derek. Today, we reflect on the labor movement’s impact on our country, and on the work ahead of us to ensure all workers are treated with the dignity and respect they deserve. We know that alone, no one person can take on the ultra-wealthy and the powerful. But by joining together in a union, working people have secured the benefits they deserve: better wages, workplace protections, health care, and even the weekend. Organizing together is more important than ever — especially right now. It’s abundantly clear that Donald Trump doesn’t care about the kitchen table issues that matter to most Americans. He and his billionaire friends don’t care about what it takes for a working family to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads, let alone make a better life for themselves and their loved ones. As the true party of labor and working people, Democrats _must_ stand with unions and up for all working people — in the halls of Congress, in state houses, on the picket lines, and in the streets. With your help, that’s exactly what we’re doing. We’ve held over 100 town halls to hold accountable the Republicans who are greenlighting Trump’s agenda that hands a giant tax cut to the wealthy while cutting access to health care and food assistance for millions of working people. We’re organizing and showing up _everywhere_ — investing in every single Democratic state party — to help elect Democrats at all levels and in all communities who will fight for working families. For working people everywhere, our fight must continue. And with your help, it will. As Trump wages his war on working families, Democrats will fiercely answer the call to the old union song, “Which Side Are You On?” **Democrats are on the side of the worker. And we will show Americans every day that workers, in fact, do have more power than any billionaire.** Thank you for taking the time to read this message, The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

| | Dear Fellow Patriot, I’m no stranger to betrayals, backstabbing, and lies. I’ve exposed corruption at the highest levels—conspiracies and cover-ups most people wouldn’t believe. You name it, I’ve seen it. In my line of work, that’s part of the job description. Exposing the truth will make you some powerful enemies who will do anything to stop, hurt, or slow you down. I’ve been through hell on earth for the sake of truth. **Not everyone takes the same risks—but everyone has a role to play.****
