clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, I’m no stranger to betrayals, backstabbing, and lies. I’ve exposed corruption at the highest levels—conspiracies and cover-ups most people wouldn’t believe. You name it, I’ve seen it. In my line of work, that’s part of the job description. Exposing the truth will make you some powerful enemies who will do anything to stop, hurt, or slow you down. I’ve been through hell on earth for the sake of truth. Not everyone takes the same risks—but everyone has a role to play. **- Because the people who do step forward—the brave, the bold, the whistleblowers—don’t get parades. They are ‘rewarded” with armed raids. They’re censored. They’re threatened with prison time and they’re sued. Their lives get torn apart... for daring to tell the truth. So we either leave them to face the fire alone—or we build them a shield. That’s the choice in front of us. Take Aaron Veckey – a 20-year veteran of the Border Patrol – who bravely stepped up and exposed the truth about the systemic abuse of power at the southern border under the Biden Administration. How was he thanked? By being treated like the enemy. They launched a federal investigation into him. They tried to silence him. He risked his pension, his career, and his safety to tell you the truth. This is the greatest testament to Aaron’s five-star character. After the abuse he faced – and on the verge of losing his job – this was what he told me: “But my conscience will be clean. It’s way more important than my pension.” Whistleblowers like Aaron deserve to be rewarded, not punished. They deserve to be protected, not attacked. They deserve to be heard, not silenced. That’s why I founded the Citizen Journalism Foundation. Whistleblowers provide a service to our nation that cannot go thankless. It’s because of them that patriots like you know the truth and can use that information to hold your elected officials accountable. This is how we spark change. This is how we take down evil. The only thing the enemies of truth fear more than one citizen journalist... is a thousand of them. Uncensored. Relentless. Doing the job the corporate media abandoned long ago. That’s the mission of the Citizen Journalism Foundation—to arm whistleblowers with a voice, and build an army of truth-tellers the system can’t ignore. But I can’t build it without you. Pursuing the truth requires extreme risk. It’s a risk I’m willing to take. But your support acts as a “Safety Net” when things go up in flames (which they often do, because when you’re taking on the rich and powerful and exposing their dirty secrets, there’s no limit to the retaliation they’ll use to “take care of the problem.”) Right now, as myself and the Citizen Journalism Foundation are taking a new leap of faith to give whistleblowers a platform to make their voices heard, I’m counting on your help. I came across a stamp that carries a simple yet profound message: “We ask but for Peace, Liberty, and Safety.” That’s all Aaron Veckey asked for. Peace. Liberty. Safety. As a Border Agent trying to do his job, and then as a whistleblower trying to do the right thing, Aaron was denied these three tenets of American freedom. Every whistleblower I have talked to as part of the Citizen Journalism Foundation’s My Price is My Life podcast has experienced similar retaliation: * Lara Logan – her career was destroyed by the mainstream media for covering the Benghazi attack. Anthony “Muckraker” Rubin – he is an investigative journalist who was kidnapped by the Gulf cartel. Dr. Rick Addante – he was a former tenured professor who exposed Florida Tech’s secret DEI fraud scheme and turned down a $96,000 severance agreement to buy his silence. W e’re just getting started. This is just the beginning of a national effort to give every brave whistleblower the microphone they’ve been denied—and to shine a floodlight on the corruption the media refuses to touch. But I can’t carry it forward without you. -** Because for whistleblowers like Dr. Addante, Lara Logan, and Aaron Veckey—the next 3 days could change everything. Together, we’ll amplify their voices. We’ll blast the truth into every corner of this country. And we’ll hold the corrupt accountable by exposing what they want hidden. | | | | In Truth, | | James O'KeefeCEO, Citizen Journalism Foundation | | | Citizen Journalism Foundation is a 501(c)(3) organization, gifts to which are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. | | Citizen Journalism Foundation P.O. Box 1225Merrifield, VA 22116-1225

The Trump administration **[announced it has created half a million new jobs](https://substack.com/redirect/f00453a0-6f57-4468-8ce7-319d5cf90a60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with "native-born workers accounting for ALL net job gains," while touting rising hourly wages, steady prices, and growing consumer confidence as evidence that "Republicans are once again the proud party of the American worker."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/be317cc2-b0a8-410d-87d1-6f78e0934959?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Workforce Development:** The administration highlighted the registration of nearly 2,000 new apprenticeship programs aimed at helping hundreds of thousands of American workers learn new skills, with a stated goal of reaching one million active apprenticeships and prioritizing programs accessible to disabled veterans.
* **Deregulation Efforts:** The White House cited the passage of the "One Big Beautiful Bill" and removal of various regulations, with the Labor Department releasing 63 deregulatory actions designed to reduce burdens on businesses and spur job creation for American workers.
* **Immigration Restrictions:** New guidance was implemented to prevent "illegal immigrants" from accessing federal workforce development resources and related grants, with the administration framing this as protecting job training opportunities for American workers while claiming nearly $10 trillion in investments resulted from Trump's trade policies.

# Chicago has murderous weekend as mayor insists he doesn't need Trump's help
At least **[seven people were killed](https://substack.com/redirect/8e6c3033-e2de-44f4-a48f-2b9d0fe3bc38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and 37 others injured in multiple unrelated shootings across Chicago during Labor Day weekend, with the majority of incidents resulting in no arrests according to police.
* **Mayor's Executive Order:** Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson signed an executive order on Saturday prohibiting local police from working with federal counterparts, stating he won't allow Trump to "deputize our police department" or deploy National Guard troops in the city. The order prevents Chicago police from cooperating with the National Guard or federal agents on patrols, arrests, immigration enforcement, or other law enforcement actions, despite Trump's suggestions to deploy federal resources to combat crime.
* **Ongoing Violence Problem:** Chicago continues to struggle with gun violence, having recorded 272 homicides this year including 225 fatal shootings, with previous bloody weekends including 55 people shot over July 4th and 22 people shot over Memorial Day weekend.

* * *
# Hershey Park horror has a happy ending - Child on monorail track saved by brave bystander
A young boy was captured on video **[walking alone on a suspended monorail track](https://substack.com/redirect/073d30a2-5b7f-4403-a072-843edc459a39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** nearly 100 feet above ground at Hersheypark in Pennsylvania, before a brave bystander took action.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8a19d1a2-e81b-433a-aab6-e0b1b1ea3d68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Rescue Effort:** Terrified spectators directed the child toward a nearby building where a man climbed onto a roof and successfully pulled the boy to safety, with the crowd erupting in cheers and applause once the rescue was complete.
* **Safety Breach:** The monorail was closed at the time with a barricaded turnstile meant to prevent access, and the boy had been reported missing around 5 p.m. Saturday after becoming separated from his parents before accessing the restricted area.
* **Park Response:** Hersheypark officials expressed gratitude for guest vigilance and their team's swift response while reaffirming their commitment to maintaining high safety standards, though some social media users criticized the park's security measures following the incident.

* * *

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Nancy Pelosi Speaker Emerita [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP42/1/88466/images/Speaker%20Emerita%20logo.png]

Dear Friends,

Every day — and especially on Labor Day — we honor America’s workers and the unions that built America’s middle class. The middle class has a union label on it. And the middle class is the backbone of our Democracy. Labor unions built our country’s ladders of opportunity — with values of community and dignity that bind us as Americans: we are all in this together.

We don't agonize, we organize and we unionize! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP42/1/88466/images/20250901_em_ex_b1_np4c_grassroots.jpg]

WATCH HERE >> [https://x.com/TeamPelosi]

Since the current occupant of the White House barged back into office in January, his Administration has waged a direct and illegal assault on the rights of workers. This anti-union, anti-worker attack has stripped away collective bargaining from hundreds of thousands of our public servants, including those who care for our veterans — many of whom are veterans themselves.

Washington Republicans have shown us exactly who they are — they voted to strip health care and food aid from more than 20 million Americans and pushed policies that are making it harder to afford groceries, gas and other everyday essentials. While giving billionaires massive tax breaks that will add trillions to the national debt. To put it plainly, Democrats are on the side of America’s working families — and Republicans are on the side of Donald Trump and their billionaire donors.

Hardworking Americans need a Congress that works for them — not against them. That's why the 2025 and 2026 elections are so critical. Working together in solidarity, we will fight for good paying jobs, for collective bargaining and for dignity at work and in retirement.

Together, we will win critical elections in 2025; we will take back Congress in 2026 to put a legislative check on Trump and his minions; and we will defend our Democracy.

We don't agonize — we organize! And we unionize!

Happy Labor Day,
NANCY
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District.
She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support?

body:
Happy Labor Day, Peter.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250901-1&t=1&akid=2599%2E587540%2EqoOJxv)
Happy Labor Day, Peter. 💪
Today, we recognize the workers who keep this country running — and the labor movement that’s fought generation after generation to make sure their work is respected, protected, and fairly paid.
From teachers to nurses, delivery drivers to grocery clerks, farmworkers to auto workers — progress has always been built from the ground up. And it’s often been young, working-class people who led the way.
At Leaders We Deserve, we’re proud to support candidates who don’t just talk about labor — they come from it. They organize, they fight, and they legislate with working people at the center.
We know the work isn’t over. But today, we pause to celebrate those who do it — every shift, every day.
If you’ve got the day off, enjoy it. You’ve earned it.
— Leaders We Deserve

clean_body: Happy Labor Day, Peter. Happy Labor Day, Peter. 💪 Today, we recognize the workers who keep this country running — and the labor movement that’s fought generation after generation to make sure their work is respected, protected, and fairly paid. From teachers to nurses, delivery drivers to grocery clerks, farmworkers to auto workers — progress has always been built from the ground up. And it’s often been young, working-class people who led the way. At Leaders We Deserve, we’re proud to support candidates who don’t just talk about labor — they come from it. They organize, they fight, and they legislate with working people at the center. We know the work isn’t over. But today, we pause to celebrate those who do it — every shift, every day. If you’ve got the day off, enjoy it. You’ve earned it. — Leaders We Deserve

name: Carol Obando-Derstine
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carol for PA
body:
I wanted to reach out to share my story about why this day matters to me.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114418518/566960991/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-09-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjhmZjQ0MTUtNDg4Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x71X_4G352jIoUDPL4mLJAlsZzovo442j0R2jlcS8Zo=)
---
| Happy Labor Day, team!

I wanted to reach out to share my story about why this day matters to me.

My mother worked as a factory machine operator, and my father as a hospital technician. Both were proud union members. They taught me that dignity in work and fairness on the job aren’t privileges, but that they’re rights worth fighting for.

I still carry their lessons with me today. When my family immigrated to the U.S., we struggled through financial hardship, language barriers, and sacrifice. I know first-hand that union jobs give families like mine stability and a foundation to build a better future. It’s why I’ve spent my life serving others — from leading nonprofits and advocating for children, to helping students prepare for careers, to working on energy solutions that save families money.

This Labor Day, I’m committed to carrying forward that fight for working families in Congress. We need leaders who understand that protecting workers’ rights, strengthening unions, and ensuring fair wages aren’t just talking points — they’re the heart of what makes the American dream possible.

I hope you and your family have a safe and restful Labor Day.

– Carol
---
| | Carol Obando-Derstine is an engineer, advocate, educator, and bilingual leader running for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 7th District. The daughter of union workers, she has spent her career standing up for working families, expanding opportunities for children, and strengthening her community.

She’s running for Congress in one of the most competitive seats in the country. name: Christina Bohannan
subject: The spirit of Labor Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114418761/566962005/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGQxMDg4NC00ODg3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rmEE4Z3IXeYpimPkXmDu6j5wMPkdokQA0I31vcOFm4Q=)
Peter,

As Americans prepare to enjoy our well-deserved long weekend, it’s important to remember the meaning of Labor Day and what labor has done for all working people in our country.

From more reasonable work hours to safer conditions to better wages and benefits, unions have pushed to ensure that hard work is rewarded with a decent quality of life, and that all workers are treated with dignity and respect.

I have seen the difference unions make in families. My Dad was a construction worker who did not have the opportunity to join a union. So when he got sick, he lost his health insurance, and we lost everything trying to afford his medicines and hospital bills.

And when I was in high school, my uncle was killed on a non-union construction site that had unsafe conditions and equipment.

But fast-forward a generation, and I have family members who do belong to a union. They have had the healthcare and benefits they needed — to beat cancer, to provide for their families, and to thrive.

Unions built the middle class. And they have improved conditions for all working and retired people, regardless of union membership. So if you work for a living, or ever have, you can thank organized labor for making your life better.

To my union friends, to everyone who works for a living, and to everyone who is now retired from a lifetime of work —

A heartfelt Happy Labor Day!

Christina

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/]
Happy Labor Day, Peter!
Today, we recognize the incredible contributions that workers across our great state of Colorado—and the entire nation—make every day.
The Labor Movement has fought for fair wages, safe working conditions, and reasonable hours for workers, and today we honor the progress that has been made and recommit to the fight for workers rights in Colorado and nationwide.
https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/]
No person should have to choose between a day’s pay or standing in an eight-hour line to vote. That’s why I fought for increased early voting, more ballot drop boxes, and more day-of voting locations as Secretary of State. I’ve stood on the picket line with workers, and as Attorney General, I will continue to be an advocate for collective bargaining, the right to unionize, and a fair living wage. It's an honor to have the support of 14 unions across Colorado!
As you enjoy Labor Day, I hope you find a moment to reflect on the contributions that workers have made to our state and the ways we can continue to support them in the future.
Wishing you a wonderful Labor Day!
Jena Griswold

name: AOC
subject: A crossroads.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This movement is not about partisan labels or purity tests. It is about class solidarity.
It's about the thousands of _you_ who stand together and say **our lives deserve dignity, and our work deserves respect**.
It will never be just institutions and officials alone that uphold our democracy. It will always be the people — the masses who refuse to comply with authoritarian regimes — who are the last and strongest defense of our country and our freedoms.
We are at a crossroads: oligarchy or democracy. But we cannot have both.
I've made my choice. **We must fight the oligarchy that has created this nightmare**.
And that is why I have never taken money from lobbyists or corporations. And it's why I never will.
But beyond elections, **our task is to build community**. Block associations, volunteer groups, church organizations, PTA's, activist organizations — because **community is the most powerful building block we have to defeat authoritarianism and root out corruption**.
This is the path to guaranteeing healthcare to every American, to establish a living minimum wage, to take on skyrocketing rents and mortgages, to tackle the climate crisis, and establish a country where the American Dream is actually possible for us.
Because we know that a better world is possible. **And we are willing to do something about it**.
[Will you contribute right now to help us power our Fighting Oligarchy tour on the road?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250901.kFuwjH&refcode=em20250901-9640-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9640%2E2526796%2Es8vBbX)
Your support allows us to rally people together at record scale to organize their communities for the better world that we know is possible.
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250901.kFuwjH&refcode=em20250901-9640-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9640%2E2526796%2Es8vBbX)**
Pa’lante,
Alexandria

clean_body: This movement is not about partisan labels or purity tests. It is about class solidarity. It's about the thousands of you who stand together and say our lives deserve dignity, and our work deserves respect. It will never be just institutions and officials alone that uphold our democracy. It will always be the people — the masses who refuse to comply with authoritarian regimes — who are the last and strongest defense of our country and our freedoms. We are at a crossroads: oligarchy or democracy. But we cannot have both. I've made my choice. We must fight the oligarchy that has created this nightmare. And that is why I have never taken money from lobbyists or corporations. And it's why I never will. But beyond elections, our task is to build community. Block associations, volunteer groups, church organizations, PTA's, activist organizations — because community is the most powerful building block we have to defeat authoritarianism and root out corruption. This is the path to guaranteeing healthcare to every American, to establish a living minimum wage, to take on skyrocketing rents and mortgages, to tackle the climate crisis, and establish a country where the American Dream is actually possible for us. Because we know that a better world is possible. And we are willing to do something about it. Your support allows us to rally people together at record scale to organize their communities for the better world that we know is possible. Pa’lante, Alexandria | ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Growing up, I watched my mom dedicate her life to being a public school teacher and a proud MEA member.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114419464/566963834/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yjc1ZmMwMy00Yzg3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DVZg-It6t8X_9X_YUzjJ0BoDzjgaBKQKUwLqf-Q7_08=)
---
| Happy Labor Day, friend!

Growing up, I watched my mom dedicate her life to being a public school teacher and a proud MEA member. She showed me not only the value of hard work, but also how unions built Michigan’s middle class and secured critical protections for working families.

This holiday is about honoring the generations of workers who organized, sacrificed, and fought for the rights we sometimes take for granted today. And at a time when those rights are still under threat, I’ll never stop standing with working people and defending the freedom to organize.

I’m grateful for all you do to keep our communities strong, and I hope you and your loved ones enjoy a safe and restorative Labor Day.

With gratitude,

Hillary
---

clean_body: Growing up, I watched my mom dedicate her life to being a public school teacher and a proud MEA member. | = | Happy Labor Day, friend! Growing up, I watched my mom dedicate her life to being a public school teacher and a proud MEA member. She showed me not only the value of hard work, but also how unions built Michigan’s middle class and secured critical protections for working families. This holiday is about honoring the generations of workers who organized, sacrificed, and fought for the rights we sometimes take for granted today. And at a time when those rights are still under threat, I’ll never stop standing with working people and defending the freedom to organize. I’m grateful for all you do to keep our communities strong, and I hope you and your loved ones enjoy a safe and restorative Labor Day. With gratitude, Hillary | | Hillary Scholten represents Michigan’s 3rd Congressional District. She’s a former DOJ attorney, a Christian, and a mother of two. This Labor Day, she’s recommitting to fighting for Michigan’s working families. But she can’t do it alone. = | = * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Mark Guethle
subject: We have to thank the labor movement for a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_aug25?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/idcca_email_aug25?amount=25]

Hey friend,

As a retired union painter (District Council 30), I know that we have a lot to thank our brothers and sisters in Organized Labor for. Everything from workplace safety laws to the increase in the minimum wage are a testament to the strength of the labor movement, and their persistence in the face of pushback. Illinois is stronger because of Organized Labor.

We live in a time now where Trump and his administration are union busting in the federal government, and backing policies that will actively hurt jobs and workers. Trump has worked tirelessly to undermine the Labor Movement and he’s not going to stop.

But Illinois will continue to be a proud union state, and IDCCA will continue to be an organization that supports and advocates for workers and Organized Labor.

Thank you to everything the Labor Movement has done, and will continue to do. We truly do appreciate it.

– Mark and IDCCA

A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board’s official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL

subject: This email could change someone's life
body:
[ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=03fa9688b56649c0aae69fd3ee5a0a7b&_e=I5zB7vWZH0V12keNGHWpBpJY8ronDnlX2DR5M78ubPW0OLw30Hhr4mr4tJN3UeptM90qQH2zp5lrp6zIquNQ23Eak8P3BEianEWv3Fye4vmSmu7yGtuv8Prl7gJzzM620VTuUDpTjbHuA5modiPxtxWIYMHfkt3HrYPJDnRVn1pf7a7nvOHbOI6ZfvpuHOucH3Gw60WyxvS66Z6u1TGoQONlZLfqARFoKS-OdMyx-tul-Qf5QxMKwOfW0U-uMoa9Y6tQBVmUMbj8ffZ6Xki8UA4-ntztoXDn3eejx_k_cWUpWOO8lLTPgNyatmrHkX7a_CNY2xoXmnTWmmL-ZepZd1cQG-6DSpelwsYPmJLsX5cglkKa8jo1EaZ-LFvEJLUzMqOyUauqUvn6Cl3A9zRZGA_qDE9dSSgiyOmjayES3Q5_wPYMpdiQqM01EwGYJ3qL2QWPdrWW1QESTFCHuvpUWtsktqUbWXb8qMW9DSZJmLMPjcCtI84dZshp-3FOD6-7xuo2NGVcG4b-zbHLbEmuRmv-i0Yv_mN8FHzoLjzqc9ee7FzwoyyaHtVGnlHFh5v5jIWEL2TosHERo_uTU1bU2j8J2hwKVpiV0L2Yo9Rocz_uzz8-PorLMN3XoJv_rUjf)

Friend,

I promise I won’t take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[ If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below: ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=03fa9688b56649c0aae69fd3ee5a0a7b&_e=I5zB7vWZH0V12keNGHWpBpJY8ronDnlX2DR5M78ubPW0OLw30Hhr4mr4tJN3UeptM90qQH2zp5lrp6zIquNQ23Eak8P3BEianEWv3Fye4vmSmu7yGtuv8Prl7gJzzM620VTuUDpTjbHuA5modiPxtxWIYMHfkt3HrYPJDnRVn1qlt7SGvRJ0ADWfWqa5X8Pr1UU4h7-USUNR3A8Qkuwh1mhrCVaN_1oUQ-VX5jPyLGuYADuHUW0GEF7ZRhY1vGhtTr3whofcuGPk7Ss-qcXsdgGCz7SZQfbSCHLSs3LofMrw9ESnKIb5NaEEFrieRyquV4kmUOf9YMIUjX4P0B3YcG4E0_r_pydn4qh5GOCcUCkRBPcV3M1Wmdzz1ISpfO95PEiyqPlBfKVQhR0aVpUQeoMNma6VZdBdS3pXcAovjI7zg9Rm2lZ-sAsDIqnS5NziZFSpgfFAyLbUl2tYxve4Sknx982GYpJgaDJSidBlZlbNxpyaTl7Io7vqC2sXFIWY6YbjEWqs9VP0NmVHJlnMlpjg8bQ8kSbCsCgpKm5zZKb6sDygqG6Ywllqg-mar6nPAhVCjuzNcPMXtsGdHFoHzTx3XSRDsOSQ1aKdPixHrS2n2ynq7kvXJF4UfPwQUdM4VCKMimfj5PzH6Xr-NH8cZw%3D%3D)
[Donate Now](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=03fa9688b56649c0aae69fd3ee5a0a7b&_e=I5zB7vWZH0V12keNGHWpBpJY8ronDnlX2DR5M78ubPW0OLw30Hhr4mr4tJN3UeptM90qQH2zp5lrp6zIquNQ23Eak8P3BEianEWv3Fye4vmSmu7yGtuv8Prl7gJzzM620VTuUDpTjbHuA5modiPxtxWIYMHfkt3HrYPJDnRVn1q3fZvFHlk7IKBgfmiaK3ECH_bud8rRJlxNsAVsq8oMbqcj2m2LIJiqwLSWpMcqgJzstR0Iksu_wKV6WYQKWWjMgzFzwSK0cRrz-UuPwcM-VvVtSnxH3Szgj79tBEtIfiBEdZk2mi57e1xHv9DORj-iAd1DvNTSydS2MtTXd8EME5xJ7O4H7YVL1khwgfyEbfoJkMXb1ZnfMFTQvafHVurcWNW1Ge_slufZj1AZuBPUckgFCpPxX_v4ky_l4tUp9aLkdcOBpbty7WOzFWgBavjjw19o0y-O-U4Y58P3f_frJUGLs_9lQWi_IeR6Gpr0dkMbVFa2wEN_6LwwASStteeKOUV8PevauUrP5Lw4IQ1yy5mSJXtaIhJ6Bh5CvsZJHFEz2QiCVAhhaTQHQOrgRd-hZEbB3GFowsOo8_Wa58W_QEpC6cqiCHht7T8gL9ZkP3SGvHrI1lvu-a5O15Cf2MmxE1Gd5j50DDaI4VJFdonMtw%3D%3D)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I’m asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[ $10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone. ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=03fa9688b56649c0aae69fd3ee5a0a7b&_e=I5zB7vWZH0V12keNGHWpBpJY8ronDnlX2DR5M78ubPW0OLw30Hhr4mr4tJN3UeptM90qQH2zp5lrp6zIquNQ23Eak8P3BEianEWv3Fye4vmSmu7yGtuv8Prl7gJzzM620VTuUDpTjbHuA5modiPxtxWIYMHfkt3HrYPJDnRVn1pIpVpbsgn8zSYmsnuN6lLRtjQ8RUr7du9AwwIG-hJDlgB60yAe7d24-4IzNqyf6-Qf3UbJKhRw53Zy_w0iYEVlYZqUiAGpxiBvz36Z-ysMSQZDN0Sv5gQRbrZ631rx6i2TkrawH5oPY9GZCMz53CF9UvavkXjijx6KkGERM_PWDSmD117wOJt8DC4qfVnxdBBIAdQKIIRmz1HnQ9AiKU9hN4q5t4A5q3WM-McFqfYwXagefHLFnNPaKggFV6HYzO04RWLMqoI9xqn4TeLN6U8yCwQcVl1lrVqC2QG8XaKG6UwQyJTDyxKRiBU0YMUsLZoeOc3z4bq73aPg_aKkGxrQo2GD8H1psMfmGqiXJLhUyTHBl9gI-1NcapjIyeqfiNsDrslSOfTWeJQZkShI2Wi5qyqXsdKIEkNLmvnyfVbUrMk2h1EIm0VKVV2rWs932ayH2WryiN6OObTqrF9dkeOZUt0P-H00FMoXGJ8hkWPi0g%3D%3D)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life — law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won’t take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I’m asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life — law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Speaker Joanna McClinton
subject: This Labor Day, we honor working people🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Joanna McClinton
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjm2025email?refcode=header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjm2025email?refcode=header]
Dear Friends,
Today, we pause to commemorate Juneteenth as the powerful reminder of both our nation’s progress and the continued work ahead that it is.
Juneteenth is not just about history; it’s about legacy. It’s about recognizing the strength of those who came before us, celebrating Black excellence and resilience, and recommitting ourselves to the fight for justice, equity, and opportunity for all people.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP06/1/83310/images/juneteenth25.png]
As the first Black woman to serve as Speaker of the Pennsylvania House, I carry the weight and the hope of that legacy every day. I know we didn’t get here alone, and we won’t move forward unless we do it together. For me, it is not just about being the first, but also about ensuring that I am not the last.
Let’s use today not just to reflect but to act. Let’s support Black-owned businesses, elevate community voices, protect the right to vote, and keep pushing for policies that truly make freedom real in every zip code.
Thank you for being in this fight with me. Happy Juneteenth!
In solidarity,
Rep. Joanna E. McClinton
Speaker of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives
https://www.facebook.com/Joanna4PA [https://www.facebook.com/Joanna4PA] https://x.com/joanna4pa [https://x.com/joanna4pa] https://www.instagram.com/joanna_mcclinton/ [https://www.instagram.com/joanna_mcclinton/] https://bsky.app/profile/joanna4pa.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/joanna4pa.bsky.social] https://www.tiktok.com/@joannamcclinton [https://www.tiktok.com/@joannamcclinton] https://www.mcclintonforpa.com/ [https://www.mcclintonforpa.com/]
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Joanna McClinton serves as the Speaker of the Pennsylvania State House, while proudly serving the 191st district.
Joanna has made important strides to enact progress in the Pennsylvania Legislature. From working to protect the rights of those accused in our criminal justice system to spearheading the fight to expand our voting rights, she has proven that she will always prioritize the prosperity of Pennsylvanians over the promise of power. If you're committed to joining this fight, you can click here to make a one-time donation, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjm2025email?refcode=footer] or you can click here to make a monthly recurring donation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjm2025email?refcode=footer&recurring=1]

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: A moment of gratitude

body:

Peter,
Today, as many of us enjoy the end of summer with cookouts, time at the pool or lake, and moments with family and friends, let’s also take a step back to reflect on the true meaning of Labor Day. This holiday was won—not given—by generations of working people who fought for dignity, fairness, and the rights that built America’s middle class.
The 40-hour work week, safer workplaces, the end of child labor, fair wages, and the simple recognition that every worker deserves respect—none of these came easily. They were the result of hard-fought battles, strikes, organizing, and courage.
I am proud to stand as an ally to workers. In the Capitol, my fight is for working and middle-class families: for safe jobs, fair wages, and the promise that hard work should mean stability and opportunity—not struggle and fear.
As we celebrate this long weekend, I hope you’ll take a moment to consider how we not only protect the progress workers have made, but also how we carry their struggle forward. The history of labor teaches us that every gain was won through persistence—and that it’s on us to keep pushing for fairness and dignity in the years ahead.
Enjoy this well-deserved break, and let’s recommit ourselves to honoring the spirit of labor—not just today, but every day.
In solidarity,
Senator Heidi Campbell

Today is Labor Day – a day when we honor the workers who power Colorado and celebrate the unions that fought to build our middle class. The fight for fair pay, safe workplaces and dignity on the job continues – and I stand in solidarity with workers every step of the way.
I’ve stood with Colorado workers – from supporting union members on the picket line to standing with farm workers as they seek a pathway to citizenship to introducing legislation to protect workers' rights and bargaining power. As governor, I'll keep working to build an economy that rewards hard work, supports families and ensures all Coloradans can thrive – not just the wealthiest few.
Thank you for standing with me and workers everywhere.
– Michael

body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=yCny71QmhZNwUVNHGvAdUzNUUuCtjq31rM%2BGBOr%2FLk8%2BDlwEKQOkRN2ExWmV1KOsh7iwp2%2BSVUjsExhVGlFTlFrimi8iTJCU9tBtVFP1DN5R4tLUUnIuRWtZC4qYQ6FjgqOXpjBEvoI8jp2Gzco%2BiGGDo1qLdS3dKK9o%2FXpxuZ7lkt9CGGGuPW8DSd8cCEe%2F4lsps%2BN8avFNi7LssJStDBIirnfqMtP8cTVHaw569W%2BpgWSC1CX61I0KHHYhTLdCGJVHwXjDUgz14zU0haWcNPj8oriRBqnerh%2Bz2pQe5qpN%2BR%2F%2FFLem3j1xcD2QirElXb9sL2Y6siYI1YY7d7KXd%2FhCZSwySr33LccvFBXu5GLxGvlAkQuiVXe%2B1RPULjpuvtXlq5SZKxfItwgKvl7PrSsWqcYL9Ro6TdFP5%2BwoiKU%3D)

Last month, I traveled across southern New Mexico, and I met with the people who keep this country running. From workers in recovery building a second chance, to seniors still showing up for their communities, to small business owners, union members, and researchers shaping the future — one thing was clear: **New Mexicans are showing up every day.** They’re working hard, raising families, and they’re building lives with pride — even when the odds are stacked against them. They are the backbone of our economy, not just here in New Mexico, but across the country. **But right now, Washington is failing them.** The people at the top are much more interested in chaos than in common sense. They’re pushing policies that leave working families to fend for themselves — while billionaires and corporations get more handouts. That’s **not** how we build a strong economy. _And it’s not how we build a country that works for all of us._ This Labor Day, I’m proud to stand with unions and the labor movement that have always fought to make this country fairer for working people. Because it wasn’t corporations that gave us weekends, safer workplaces, or a minimum wage — it was organized workers demanding dignity, respect, and a voice on the job. **So, this is my promise to you:** I’ll keep fighting for the dignity of work. For fair wages, good jobs, and safe workplaces. For rural clinics, affordable healthcare, and strong public schools. For families just trying to get ahead — and stay there. clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Last month, I traveled across southern New Mexico, and I met with the people who keep this country running. From workers in recovery building a second chance, to seniors still showing up for their communities, to small business owners, union members, and researchers shaping the future — one thing was clear: New Mexicans are showing up every day. They’re working hard, raising families, and they’re building lives with pride — even when the odds are stacked against them. They are the backbone of our economy, not just here in New Mexico, but across the country. But right now, Washington is failing them. The people at the top are much more interested in chaos than in common sense. They’re pushing policies that leave working families to fend for themselves — while billionaires and corporations get more handouts. That’s not how we build a strong economy. And it’s not how we build a country that works for all of us. This Labor Day, I’m proud to stand with unions and the labor movement that have always fought to make this country fairer for working people. Because it wasn’t corporations that gave us weekends, safer workplaces, or a minimum wage — it was organized workers demanding dignity, respect, and a voice on the job. So, this is my promise to you: I’ll keep fighting for the dignity of work. For fair wages, good jobs, and safe workplaces. For rural clinics, affordable healthcare, and strong public schools. For families just trying to get ahead — and stay there. I’m in this fight with you, Gabe | | = | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Haley Stevens
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Will you join me in standing with organized labor?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=729%2E49239%2ETE0x5N)
Will you join me in standing with organized labor?
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5596?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=729%2E49239%2ETE0x5N)
---
null, it’s Haley.

Our workers are the backbone of Michigan’s economy. So this Labor Day, I’m asking you to join me in standing with the workers who punch in every day, those who have retired after years of hard work on the manufacturing floor, our youngest workers just starting out in the workforce, and so many more. **[null, will you take a moment to sign my petition in support of organized labor?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5597?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=729%2E49239%2ETE0x5N)**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5597?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=729%2E49239%2ETE0x5N)
---
**I’m proud to be a Michigander – because we _built_ this country.** Our workers led the way with ingenuity, grit, and good old-fashioned hard work.

**But Michigan wouldn’t be Michigan without our unions.**
The 40-hour workweek, overtime pay, safe working conditions, protections from discrimination – none of those rights were handed to us. Unions fought for them. We organized. We demanded better. _And we won._
But right now, those rights are under attack.

Donald Trump and his allies are doing everything they can to weaken unions and roll back progress. They want workers divided, underpaid, and unrepresented.
I’m running for Senate to fight back.

I’ve always stood with Michigan workers – from leading the 2008 auto rescue to fighting for working families in Congress. I proudly stand with union workers, and I’ll never stop fighting for fair wages, better benefits, and the dignity every Michigander deserves.
**[This Labor Day, join me in standing with organized labor. We need 5,000 names by midnight, so add your name now, null:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5597?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=729%2E49239%2ETE0x5N)**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5597?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=729%2E49239%2ETE0x5N)
---
Fighting for you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5598?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=729%2E49239%2ETE0x5N) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5596?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=729%2E49239%2ETE0x5N)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Unions built the middle class
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=QAefEtOOx0ob2RlNK9Y2uFafsBxtk2GOhvSInuYeZy83oFrZLrQvoFK1x4cD%2B9kHoyoWrM2bJaFvBi07o7CPg22NuVmQeBdAW2reUkITqjJ8JYo75Xcoft16O5lOr6ZoxtM2muHj5eas3mPRhrrn%2Bd2AL20dToHlHvCAtgGhrFQ5EENK2Mmz%2B2gTEILziA%2FqKTK9AlGi4V%2Fd%2BuKtWguJNDaynyfQ3%2FzxUf8gSvpLUqj%2FXjQ3znOhNKljPeBEzD%2F4Fh2fnghH57hJco0PwfSWit6Z4eOJI%2BWkxjz4sJbi1GU4V4Zjb3gzWvaB4YQ3CoW9ma13Qs99QZ4s8k6cYmmnzrQdp86ESb9mYsnPkfv%2F0BE2%2B%2Fn1Vh9O%2BM%2BPKVPue1urQoveZiYGzEOEqZPBczFxGHad7mfa1PAl2NPKnXZnoPlnqfca2t%2FtBunXuUQgjq3C)
---
| |
---
Happy Labor Day, Peter!

Labor Day isn’t just a holiday. It’s a reminder of everything unions and working people have fought for and everything we still have to fight for today.

Because of the labor movement, we have fair wages, safer workplaces, and protections that generations before us could only dream of. The 40-hour work week, overtime pay, and workplace safety standards didn’t come easy. They were won through struggle, solidarity, and the voices of workers who refused to be ignored.

But the fight isn’t over. Wages are still stagnant for too many. Rhode Islanders are being squeezed by rising costs. And Republicans in Congress continue to side with corporations over working people. This ongoing struggle should inspire us to keep fighting for what is right.

That’s why I’ve made it a priority to advance an agenda for working people that includes fair wages and benefits, paid time off, workplace safety and strengthening the right to organize.

This Labor Day, I want you to know: I’ll keep fighting to make sure every worker has dignity, safety, and a fair wage. Because when we stand up for working people, we strengthen our entire country.

Thank you.

— Seth

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I promise to keep fighting back and showing up for working people.
#
Happy Labor Day!
Today, I’m thinking about the hard work labor unions and working people across the country have put in to get us where we are. Just think — we owe everything to the labor movement, from child labor laws to the weekend!
At my first job, I was part of a group of employees who voted to unionize. Organizing led to better pay and benefits almost immediately. The effect was immediate. That experience shaped who I am and how I lead. I’ve seen firsthand how the freedom to organize transforms lives and makes our economy fairer.
I’m proud that in the State Senate and now in Congress, I’ve worked hard to support unions and deliver for working families. Last year, I was proud to earn the endorsement of _every local union in Delaware_ — support that means so much to me!
But while working people are doing everything they can to get ahead, Donald Trump and Republican politicians are doing everything they can to pull us backward — raising prices, gutting Medicaid, and handing more power to billionaires. **That’s why I promise to keep fighting back and showing up for working people.**
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride
* * *

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Honoring the American worker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Today, on Labor Day, we honor the American worker and those who fought for the social and economic rights of workers across the United States.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114422710/566974310/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjkxMTU4NC00ZTg3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z7xJLzgQXbquukuBJMJouH6PPZ3FL6y0sZR9r7yMSSk=&emci=f5bf971e-eb84-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=46911584-4e87-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Today, on Labor Day, we honor the American worker and those who fought for the social and economic rights of workers across the United States. As the son of a union machinist — and the husband of a union nurse — I know the difference a union makes in delivering fair wages and the strong workplace protections that every worker deserves. Union membership transforms the lives of entire families of union members. Democrats in Congress have been working hard to put power back in the hands of workers, but Trump and his cronies are working overtime to rig the economy to favor powerful corporations. Now is the time to restore fairness in the workplace and make the economy work for everybody. Unions built the middle class, and they are crucial to growing and reinforcing an economy that rewards hard-working people. I will never stop fighting for working families and ensuring they have every opportunity to succeed. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: Today, on Labor Day, we honor the American worker and those who fought for the social and economic rights of workers across the United States. | | | | Today, on Labor Day, we honor the American worker and those who fought for the social and economic rights of workers across the United States. As the son of a union machinist — and the husband of a union nurse — I know the difference a union makes in delivering fair wages and the strong workplace protections that every worker deserves. Union membership transforms the lives of entire families of union members. Democrats in Congress have been working hard to put power back in the hands of workers, but Trump and his cronies are working overtime to rig the economy to favor powerful corporations. Now is the time to restore fairness in the workplace and make the economy work for everybody. Unions built the middle class, and they are crucial to growing and reinforcing an economy that rewards hard-working people. I will never stop fighting for working families and ensuring they have every opportunity to succeed. Onward! name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Grateful for the support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40087%2E3422442%2EfINSfR)
Hi Peter,
We wanted to send you a short message of gratitude today.
Because of grassroots supporters, we reached our August end-of-month goal—and that’s no small thing. Every contribution, whether it’s $5 or $50, adds up to something powerful: a campaign fueled by people, not special interests.
Your grassroots support shows the strength of this movement and proves we have what it takes to stand up to Trump and his cronies. But this is just the beginning—every milestone we hit helps build the momentum we need to win.
Together, we’re showing California that we can bring this home—and now we’re ready to carry that momentum straight into September and beyond.
With gratitude,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250901-40087&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40087_3422442_fINSfR&akid=40087%2E3422442%2EfINSfR)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40087&t=4&akid=40087%2E3422442%2EfINSfR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40087)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40087&t=5&akid=40087%2E3422442%2EfINSfR)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: =?UTF-8?Q?James_O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: He risked his pension, his career, and his safety to tell you the truth…
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11240646/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNDZCQTdWUEFTTg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDE/LbmNscTYxaHhQSw/qP2hpZHM9bmNqa0JTN3dtRndQcHpscw/gaLXIIg/s3l0bba4061)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
|
---
| | Fellow Patriot, I’m no stranger to betrayals, backstabbing, and lies. I’ve exposed corruption at the highest levels—conspiracies and cover-ups most people wouldn’t believe. You name it, I’ve seen it. In my line of work, that’s part of the job description. Exposing the truth will make you some powerful enemies who will do anything to stop, hurt, or slow you down. I’ve been through hell on earth for the sake of truth. **Not everyone takes the same risks—but everyone has a role to play.** **
******[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) [And right now, I’m asking you to play yours.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Because the people who do step forward—the brave, the bold, the whistleblowers—don’t get parades. **They are ‘rewarded” with armed raids. They’re censored. They’re threatened with prison time and they’re sued.** Their lives get torn apart... for daring to tell the truth. **So we either leave them to face the fire alone—or we build them a shield.** That’s the choice in front of us.
---
[ **DONATE TO CJF** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Take Aaron Veckey – a 20-year veteran of the Border Patrol – who bravely stepped up and exposed the truth about the systemic abuse of power at the southern border under the Biden Administration. How was he thanked? By being treated like the enemy. * They launched a federal investigation into him. * They tried to silence him. * He risked his pension, his career, and his safety to tell you the truth. This is the greatest testament to Aaron’s five-star character. After the abuse he faced – and on the verge of losing his job – this was what he told me: **_“But my conscience will be clean. It’s way more important than my pension.”_** Whistleblowers like Aaron deserve to be rewarded, not punished.
---
They deserve to be protected, not attacked. They deserve to be heard, not silenced. [**Thanks to the generous support of patriots like you, I’m giving whistleblowers****like Aaron a platform. Today, I need your help to make their voices heard.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) That’s why I founded the Citizen Journalism Foundation. Whistleblowers provide a service to our nation that cannot go thankless. It’s because of them that patriots like you know the truth and can use that information to hold your elected officials accountable. _This_ is how we spark change. _This_ is how we take down evil. **The only thing the enemies of truth fear more than one citizen journalist... is a thousand of them.** **
**Uncensored. Relentless. Doing the job the corporate media abandoned long ago. That’s the mission of the Citizen Journalism Foundation—**to arm whistleblowers with a voice, and build an army of truth-tellers the system can’t ignore.** But I can’t build it without you. Pursuing the truth requires extreme risk. It’s a risk I’m willing to take. But your support acts as a “Safety Net” when things go up in flames (which they often do, because when you’re taking on the rich and powerful and exposing their dirty secrets, there’s no limit to the retaliation they’ll use to “take care of the problem.”) Right now, as myself and the Citizen Journalism Foundation are taking a new leap of faith to give whistleblowers a platform to make their voices heard, I’m counting on your help. **[In fact, I’m asking you to rush an emergency, tax-deductible donation.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** I came across a stamp that carries a simple yet profound message: **“We ask but for Peace, Liberty, and Safety.”** That’s all Aaron Veckey asked for. _Peace. Liberty. Safety._ As a Border Agent trying to do his job, and then as a whistleblower trying to do the right thing, Aaron was denied these three tenets of American freedom. Every whistleblower I have talked to as part of the Citizen Journalism Foundation’s _My Price is My Life_ podcast has experienced similar retaliation: *** Lara Logan – her career was destroyed by the mainstream media for covering the Benghazi attack. *** Anthony “Muckraker” Rubin – he is an investigative journalist who was kidnapped by the Gulf cartel. *** Dr. Rick Addante – he was a former tenured professor who exposed Florida Tech’s secret DEI fraud scheme and turned down a $96,000 severance agreement to buy his silence. **We’re just getting started.** This is just the beginning of a national effort to give _every brave whistleblower_ the microphone they’ve been denied—and to shine a floodlight on the corruption the media refuses to touch. **But I can’t carry it forward without you.** **[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[I need you to rush back your tax-deductible donation in the next 3 days.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)****
**
Because for whistleblowers like Dr. Addante, Lara Logan, and Aaron Veckey—**the next 3 days could change everything.** Together, we’ll amplify their voices. We’ll blast the truth into every corner of this country. And we’ll hold the corrupt accountable by exposing what they want hidden. **[Please rush back your tax-deductible donation to help me and the Citizen Journalism Foundation give whistleblowers their voices back.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
| | [ **DONATE TO CJF** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | In Truth,
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**James O'Keefe** **CEO, Citizen Journalism Foundation**
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Citizen Journalism Foundation is a 501(c)(3) organization, gifts to which are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.
---
| | **Citizen Journalism Foundation** P.O. Box 1225 Merrifield, VA 22116-1225 [Privacy Policy](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11240646/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDE/LbmNscTYxaHhQSw/qP2hpZHM9bmNqa0JTN3dtRndQcHpscw/gaLXIIg/sdu7dfc3514)

And we’ll hold the corrupt accountable by exposing what they want hidden. | | | | In Truth, | | James O'Keefe CEO, Citizen Journalism Foundation | | | Citizen Journalism Foundation is a 501(c)(3) organization, gifts to which are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. | | Citizen Journalism Foundation P.O. Box 1225 Merrifield, VA 22116-1225

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: No economic justice without workers’ justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Happy Labor Day, Peter.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250901-5395-footer&t=1&akid=5395%2E420207%2EOU2oYj)
Peter,
Labor Day isn't just a long weekend. It's a celebration of the people who make this country run — and a reminder that when workers organize, they win.
So today, I want to say it loud and clear:
**Thank you, unions.****✊ 🏽**
Thank you to every worker striking right now for better wages and safer conditions.
Thank you to the domestic workers who still don’t have basic labor protections — but are demanding them.
Thank you to farmworkers, rideshare drivers, nurses, teachers, baristas — everyone who’s standing up and saying: we deserve better.
**Washington is one of the most pro-worker states in the country.** That’s no accident.
We’ve fought hard — _and won_ — livable wages, strong worker protections, and the right to organize.
But across the country, the fight continues.
Big corporations and billionaires still hoard record profits while working families are being squeezed. Too many workers still lack paid sick leave, safety protections, or a voice on the job.
That’s why I’m proud to fight in Congress for:
✅ The PRO Act to protect the right to organize
✅ A National Domestic Workers Bill of Rights
✅ Stronger protections for farmworkers and gig workers
✅ A real living wage for all workers, not just the wealthiest ZIP codes
Because this much is true: _**There is no economic justice without workers’ justice.**_
So if you’re celebrating today — whether you’re hanging with friends, walking a picket line, or just getting some well-earned rest — take a moment to honor the workers who made it possible. And commit to standing in solidarity tomorrow, too.
Thank you,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250901-5395-footer&t=2&refcode2=5395_420207_OU2oYj&akid=5395%2E420207%2EOU2oYj)**

name: Ami Bera
subject: Wishing you all a happy Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
This Labor Day, we celebrate the hardworking Americans who power our economy, support our families, and strengthen our communities

| Peter,

This Labor Day, we celebrate the hardworking Americans who **power our economy, support our families, and strengthen our communities** — often without the recognition they deserve.

The labor movement has brought us so much: the 40-hour workweek, workplace safety standards, protections against child labor, and the right to organize. These hard-won victories didn’t happen overnight — they came through generations of workers standing up for fairness, dignity, and opportunity for all.

**I’m committed to building an economy that works for everyone, not just those at the top.** That means fighting for living wages, affordable health care, safe working conditions, and protecting every American’s right to vote and make their voice heard.

I’m also deeply grateful for your continued support.**Whether you’ve stood with me through your advocacy, your engagement, or your vote—thank you.** Your partnership makes this work possible. Together, we can keep pushing for a more perfect union.

Wishing you and your loved ones a safe and meaningful Labor Day.

Be well,
Ami Bera
---

name: Arizona Democratic Party
subject: This Labor Day, we remember who built Arizona
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
Guess what she's running for now? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114423961/566977280/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250901_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBkZDY5MWQtNTQ4Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fE8qtljqy2yhe18_azvK7oeH6I2DA4r1jLxnLPR_sPE=)
---
Happy Labor Day!

**Today, we honor the workers who built our state — and the unions that fought to make their lives better.**

Arizona's labor history runs deeper than most people realize. In 1884, over 300 miners in Tombstone went on strike when mine owners slashed their wages by 25%.

In 1917, 5,000 copper workers struck across the state, leading to the infamous Bisbee Deportation, when over 1,200 workers were forcibly removed to New Mexico.

These workers understood something that's still true today: _When working families organize, they win._ That's how unions built the middle class. And that's why we're proud to work alongside unions today to support Arizona families.

**But right now, working families are under assault from Trump's anti-worker agenda:**
* **He's gutting Medicaid** , taking healthcare away from hundreds of thousands of Arizonans,
* **His tariffs are driving up costs** on everything from groceries to gas,
* **He's stripping away safety regulations** that protect workers from harmful substances,
* **He's eliminating overtime protections** , cutting paychecks for families who need every dollar,
* **And he's rolling back environmental protections** that keep communities safe.

This isn't just policy — it's personal. When Trump eliminates safety regulations, workers get hurt. When he cuts overtime protections, families lose income. When he gives corporate bad actors a free pass, working people pay the price.

**We can’t let this happen. We're fighting back, and we need you with us.**

The Arizona Democratic Party is standing with unions and working families against Trump's assault on workers and their rights. We're fighting for good union jobs, higher wages, and an economy where families can thrive instead of just survive.

[**This Labor Day, will you sign your name and commit to supporting working families who are fighting Trump's anti-worker agenda?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114423962/566977281/-662097762?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250901_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBkZDY5MWQtNTQ4Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fE8qtljqy2yhe18_azvK7oeH6I2DA4r1jLxnLPR_sPE=&emci=3d275d0b-e784-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=80dd691d-5487-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9307116) | [SUPPORT WORKING FAMILIES ✊](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114423963/566977282/-662097762?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250901_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBkZDY5MWQtNTQ4Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fE8qtljqy2yhe18_azvK7oeH6I2DA4r1jLxnLPR_sPE=&emci=3d275d0b-e784-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=80dd691d-5487-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9307116)
---
From those Tombstone miners to today's teachers fighting for better schools and healthcare workers demanding safe staffing, Arizona workers have never backed down from a fight.

**When working families organize, they win. When they vote, they win. When they stand together, they're unstoppable.**

Happy Labor Day, and thank you for standing with us.

In solidarity,
Arizona Democratic Party

Arizona Democratic Party
PO Box 36123
Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123
United States **[info@azdem.org](mailto:info@azdem.org)** | **PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. GREG FREEMAN, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG**

# Hello Capitalists,
### **Here 's everything you need to be following today:**
* Trump is on the warpath after Appeals Court throws out his tariffs
* Gas prices plummet over Labor Day to 5 year lows
* Alibaba soars on the back of homemade chips and AI
* EU Chief's plane has its GPS jammed over Bulgaria

### **Today 's markets:**
* **DOW: ⛔️ CLOSED ⛔️**
* **S &P: ⛔️ CLOSED ⛔️**
* **NASDAQ: ⛔️ CLOSED ⛔️**
* **CBOE VIX Volatility Index: ⛔️ CLOSED ⛔️**

* * *
# Trump issues dire warning after tariffs get thrown out by Federal Appeals court
President Donald Trump warned Sunday that a federal court's ruling against his tariffs could cripple $15 trillion in U.S. investment, potentially plunging the nation into **["Third World" status,](https://substack.com/redirect/ac4d393b-30a2-42b3-8271-b7114b0f3e26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** escalating trade policy tensions.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ac4d393b-30a2-42b3-8271-b7114b0f3e26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Court Rules Tariffs Unlawful** : A federal appeals court declared most of Trump's tariffs illegal under the IEEPA (International Emergency Economic Powers Act,) affirming a prior U.S. Court of International Trade ruling.
* **Tariffs Remain Temporarily Active** : The tariffs stay in effect until October 14 creating uncertainty for U.S. trade policy.
* **Trump wrote:** "If a Radical Left Court is allowed to terminate these Tariffs, almost all of this investment, and much more, will be immediately cancelled! In many ways, we would become a Third World Nation, with no hope of GREATNESS again. TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE!!! "
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ac4d393b-30a2-42b3-8271-b7114b0f3e26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **White House trade counselor** Peter Navarro **[slammed the court's 7-4 ruling](https://substack.com/redirect/102f9452-cb13-4748-8db2-eace2505a265?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** against Trump's tariffs as "weaponized partisan injustice," signaling a Supreme Court appeal to defend U.S. trade protections.
* **Navarro Alleges Democratic Bias:** Navarro claimed the appeals court's decision was driven by Democratic appointees, with six of seven judges and 12 blue states opposing Trump's tariff policies.
* **Strong Dissent Offers Hope:** A robust dissent in the 7-4 ruling provides a roadmap for a Supreme Court appeal, addressing issues like national emergency validity and tariff permanence.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/6ee8de78-6dc6-4774-a551-a37489506260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Investors are watching this fast-growing tech company](https://substack.com/redirect/6ee8de78-6dc6-4774-a551-a37489506260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6ee8de78-6dc6-4774-a551-a37489506260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
No, it's not Nvidia... It's **Mode Mobile** , 2023's fastest-growing software company according to Deloitte.
Their EarnPhone has helped users earn and save over $325M, driving $75M+ in revenue and **[an eye-popping 32,481% growth](https://substack.com/redirect/6ee8de78-6dc6-4774-a551-a37489506260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** And having secured partnerships with **Walmart** and **Best Buy** , Mode's not stopping there...
Like Uber turned vehicles into income-generating assets, Mode is turning smartphones into **[an easy passive income source](https://substack.com/redirect/6ee8de78-6dc6-4774-a551-a37489506260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **The difference is that you still have a chance to invest in Mode's pre-IPO offering before the window closes.
They've just been granted the stock ticker _**$MODE**_ by the Nasdaq and over 50,000 investors participated in their previously sold out offering at $0.30/share.
**⏳[$52M+ already raised -- invest before the opportunity closes.](https://substack.com/redirect/6ee8de78-6dc6-4774-a551-a37489506260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# Gas prices hit 5 year low as "all-of-the-above" energy policy starts to pay off
Gas prices plummeted to a **[five-year low of $3.15 per gallon](https://substack.com/redirect/1e819d15-1970-4a36-96f3-3dbd516bcb5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for Labor Day 2025, as Trump's energy policies unleashed American production, easing costs for millions of holiday travelers nationwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1e819d15-1970-4a36-96f3-3dbd516bcb5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Energy Dominance Drives Savings** : Trump's reversal of Biden-era green policies boosted U.S. energy output, directly lowering fuel costs and benefiting consumers, per White House statements.
* **Gas Prices Trend Downward** : Analysts predict prices may drop below $3 per gallon in September 2025 as demand falls post-holiday, offering further relief.
* **Policy Shift Fuels Prosperity** : Energy Secretary Chris Wright credits Trump's "all-of-the-above" energy strategy for creating jobs and enhancing economic and national security.
* **Comparative Price Decline** : Gas prices fell from $3.29 in 2024 and $3.77 in 2022, showcasing significant progress under Trump's energy agenda.

* * *
* * *
# Alibaba shares soar on the back of AI growth and chip development
Alibaba's Hong Kong shares **[surged 19% Monday, hitting a six-month high,](https://substack.com/redirect/1551a6e0-7e94-4c2f-91d0-41f1d981fbb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as its cloud unit's AI-driven growth and a new AI chip development fueled investor optimism in China's tech giant.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1551a6e0-7e94-4c2f-91d0-41f1d981fbb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Cloud Unit Accelerates Growth:** Alibaba's cloud computing division reported strong quarterly results, driven by surging demand for AI-related products, boosting overall revenue despite a broader revenue miss.
* **New AI Chip Development:** Sources revealed Alibaba is developing a new AI-focused chip, aiming to strengthen domestic semiconductor capabilities and enhance its technological edge in AI applications.
* **Instant Commerce Investment Surge:** Alibaba is heavily investing in China's competitive "instant commerce" market, though this contributed to an 18% drop in net income excluding investment gains.
* **Investor Confidence Rebounds Strongly:** The stock rally reflects growing investor support for Alibaba's strategic shift toward AI and cloud infrastructure, building on a 13% U.S. share increase Friday.

* * *
* * *
# EU commission confirms "GPS interference" to chief's plane mid-air over Bulgaria
Suspected Russian **[GPS jamming disrupted a plane](https://substack.com/redirect/c6e47131-9fe8-4f24-b3e8-dea17f1f1256?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** carrying EU chief Ursula von der Leyen over Bulgaria on Sunday, forcing pilots to navigate manually, escalating tensions as she tours frontline nations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c6e47131-9fe8-4f24-b3e8-dea17f1f1256?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Bulgarian Authorities Suspect Russia:** The European Commission confirmed GPS interference on von der Leyen's plane, with Bulgarian officials pointing to Russia as the likely culprit behind the deliberate disruption.
* **Safe Landing Despite Jamming:** The chartered plane landed safely in Plovdiv using paper maps, allowing von der Leyen to continue her tour of EU states bordering Russia and Belarus.
* **EU Strengthens Defense Resolve:** The incident reinforces the EU's commitment to bolster defense capabilities and support Ukraine, amid ongoing Russian hybrid threats like GPS jamming.
* **Kremlin Denies Involvement:** Russian spokesperson Dmitry Peskov called the jamming allegations "incorrect," while the EU noted a rise in such incidents since the Ukraine war began.

* * *
* * *
# India seeks to strengthen ties with China and Japan in the face of US tariffs
Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi arrived in China Sunday, seeking to mend ties strained by border disputes, as **[both nations face U.S. tariffs](https://substack.com/redirect/000ba2de-8ec4-4d8c-8123-a97d97930248?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , signaling a potential economic realignment against Washington's pressure.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/000ba2de-8ec4-4d8c-8123-a97d97930248?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Border Dispute Progress** : India and China are cautiously de-escalating tensions from the 2020 Galwan Valley clash, resuming direct flights and discussing visa relaxations to bolster economic ties.
* **SCO's Strategic Role** : Modi's attendance at the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation summit highlights India's renewed interest in the China-Russia-led bloc, driven by strained U.S. relations and tariff disputes.
* **Economic Cooperation Potential** : India aims to leverage China's manufacturing strength for electronics production, seeking lower import duties to reduce its $99.2 billion trade deficit with Beijing.
* **Regional Alliance Shifts** : Modi's Japan visit en route to China underscores India's push for diversified partnerships and closer ties for regional supply chain stability.
