name: Shawn Harris
subject: I’m a Dirt Road Democrat. Add your name if you are, too >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA
body:
| | [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/Up0Y5R6AY9-KnYdyXnESug~~/AAPPABA~/1LYMF3dzgVnEzo_3-CxxY4hwxYTEv5Dyi2c_HROmKHz7OJxzDOMcIzeeVNsd-H7lF0ELQ_1NbUrqj5TBWXYxqPkR3TPmOAi9K_DrZRAs0XUM3N2dV1PkhFPOBLs-OukJ7iUwZNNol7Og1WInbq-p5r_JWSsZ4jdF-Yq-cbo4huTxFss-OWHP1sbDK-um3Yp7Oojg33ugL7PBpn6Y9U0GIx3gK1JyPjrFOBZGOFAWgDztIoaWF35gR7Tk2M5inWTFzU9vYuW8gYuEVWCqOUd7Dzn9knAnNagEHJDhvcLdzZ5gEFRPlJ8ZXf8D11dczaj7)
---
Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat running to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene. When I say I'm a _Dirt Road Democrat,_ I don't mean it as a slogan. I mean it as a way of life.
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/8wr7XEUlxlPm6GdSSghPkw~~/AAPPABA~/3zn1ene3JwpXqzHf0BmWuJRZ6R_PeyMcm-6KcSoFSyHsW5j2Y-3mndKJe2aTakJEZCspofAudgnV6hgiQomICg5PKbNSxjXeZg9u-97_fVtaTa085uAr19guo6I_1ahg84Gfh-PHQJoyqN1EMFbOQN66AykKFO4Yy4t9L04Q3FVc18J-SOnTYkzWWyS0PRvHlWC7iHeIRPpqlUwfh1rCG1m1fjkxm6-Y13wR3NWDy0DFUpushCCgqwfhR8gKzaxMlFycLFZqfHGhBRTlGzN-CA~~)
---
Being a Dirt Road Democrat means more than identifying with where we live--it means standing up for the values rural communities care about most:**_fairness, opportunity, and dignity._** For too long, rural Georgia has been treated like an afterthought. Our **hospitals** have shut their doors, our **farmers** face rising costs and shrinking margins, and our**small towns** have lost jobs while politicians in Washington argue on TV. Meanwhile, Marjorie Taylor Greene has spent her time chasing headlines instead of delivering results. That's not leadership--it's abandonment. We're building something different. Being a Dirt Road Democrat is about showing up everywhere, fighting for affordable healthcare, protecting Social Security and Medicare, investing in local schools, and making sure rural Georgia has the same shot at prosperity as anyone else. [**And we 're not just building a campaign--we're building a movement. That's why I'm asking you to take the first step with me: Will you add your name to let me know that YOU are a Dirt Road Democrat?**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/8wr7XEUlxlPm6GdSSghPkw~~/AAPPABA~/3zn1ene3JwpXqzHf0BmWuJRZ6R_PeyMcm-6KcSoFSyHsW5j2Y-3mndKJe2aTakJEZCspofAudgnV6hgiQomICg5PKbNSxjXeZg9u-97_fVtaTa085uAr19guo6I_1ahg84Gfh-PHQJoyqN1EMFbOQN66AykKFO4Yy4t9L04Q3FVc18J-SOnTYkzWWyS0PRvHlWC7iHeIRPpqlUwfh1rCG1m1fjkxm6-Y13wR3NWDy0DFUpushCCgqwfhR8gKzaxMlFycLFZqfHGhBRTlGzN-CA~~)
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME >>** ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/8wr7XEUlxlPm6GdSSghPkw~~/AAPPABA~/3zn1ene3JwpXqzHf0BmWuJRZ6R_PeyMcm-6KcSoFSyHsW5j2Y-3mndKJe2aTakJEZCspofAudgnV6hgiQomICg5PKbNSxjXeZg9u-97_fVtaTa085uAr19guo6I_1ahg84Gfh-PHQJoyqN1EMFbOQN66AykKFO4Yy4t9L04Q3FVc18J-SOnTYkzWWyS0PRvHlWC7iHeIRPpqlUwfh1rCG1m1fjkxm6-Y13wR3NWDy0DFUpushCCgqwfhR8gKzaxMlFycLFZqfHGhBRTlGzN-CA~~)
---
Together, we're sending a message loud and clear that rural voters matter, that we won't be written off anymore, and that it's time for leaders who actually fight for us. **Together, we can defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and prove that dirt roads lead somewhere powerful.** Onward, Shawn Harris
---

name: Paul Feeney, State Senator
subject: Celebrating Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter,
Thirty-six years ago this week, as I was entering 6th grade, my friend and I spotted the branded truck on a side street in Roslindale. I pedaled my BMX furiously down the hill to the replacement worker who had already started climbing the telephone pole. I began my verbal barrage, of what I will call “picket line poetry”, that I had learned while walking the line with my Dad and his buddies outside of a warehouse just a few days before. We stayed, and he was stuck, until the cops showed up and asked us nicely to let him down. Victory!
Eleven years old, on a bike, with a high-pitched voice, a “colorful” vocabulary, and a chip on my shoulder, I know I did nothing to settle a strike that late Summer day, one that was fought over healthcare benefits and lasted for 17 weeks, but the pride I felt in throwing a figurative “punch” in that fight was pivotal in my own life.
Eleven years later, as I began my own career at the same company, I signed a card with my beloved IBEW and walked down a path that led me to a 20-year career, a blessed life, and an opportunity to serve, as a union steward, labor activist, and now as a State Senator. Opportunities I had, not because of me, but those who came before me. One, fleeting, coming-of-age MOMENT in a larger MOVEMENT based in struggle that continues today.
Right now:
- Teamster waste and recycling workers in Eastern Massachusetts are walking the line 24/7 while their employer refuses to negotiate in good faith.
- UNITE HERE concession workers continue to mobilize and build solidarity for a fair contract at Fenway Park.
- Across the Commonwealth, workers are facing a new threat in the expansion of job-killing technologies backed by billionaires hell-bent on increasing profits at the expense of working people.
The list goes on and on. These workers join an unbroken line of working-class heroes who sacrifice for something far greater than themselves to build the American middle class.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Paul%20Feeney%20-%20Local%2025.jpg]
Longtime President of IBEW Local 2222, Ed Fitzpatrick, is a friend and a mentor who passed away in 2021, known for delivering passionate speeches while perched on the back of pickup trucks and armed with a bullhorn would paraphrase author John Shipp: “In times of crisis,” Fitzy would belt, “you can get bitter..... or you can get better.”
There is no doubt that we face a growing crisis, and it is easy to be bitter. As the threats to working people mount, not only by profit-driven corporations, but poll-driven policy makers, a narcissistic punk in the White House, and the greedy billionaires and weak sycophants that empower him, it is incumbent upon US to RISE UP, to ACT UP, and to SPEAK OUT for those who fought FOR the American Dream only to watch it slip FROM their grasp.
As Democrats in Massachusetts, our history is deeply rooted in giving an unconditional voice to those who sign the back of their paycheck; our future must be too.
I know we are not perfect, but I also believe that because of the people that we celebrate today, our Commonwealth has always been the moral compass for the rest of our Nation when it comes to giving a voice to working people.
On Labor Day, with history’s eyes upon us, for the sake of the next generation, our Commonwealth, and our Nation; We may rightfully FEEL BITTER, but must FIGHT FOR BETTER. It’s who we are as a party, and as a people.
With sincere gratitude to the union members, leaders, activists, organizers, and workers of all sectors and trades. Have a restful, enjoyable, and HAPPY LABOR DAY TODAY, and let’s continue to fight for TOMORROW!
...Oh, and if you get a chance, visit a picket line and bring along a young person.
I promise you, it matters!
With Gratitude & Solidarity,
Paul R. Feeney
MA State Senator
Bristol & Norfolk District
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Paul%20Feeney%20Headshot.jpg]

Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

name: Vincent Dixie
subject: Unions are family. Trump doesn’t get that.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee
body:
Growing up, I never missed a meal thanks to my mom’s union sisters — but Trump stands with billionaires, not working people.

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-aDJ2ULat0eGizKGOUwdcQ~~/AAUS1hA~/GdD8b8BAk7W6xyYLjygbuJD_YEAMUYhJ15fOkOxLe05FFllmErkZWNnzniZmOL7RkNpXfTnnN03ojoXfyMDUZzDkm-doEmchPrYe_lhtuWz6ZkvxYQlE1QL0gpNH76Mh7_9ixcsuMQzyqwwWzwvC3A4qygrcvZ8B7hI8HqQPNJ0~)
| | | | Hi Peter, I never went hungry growing up. My mom never fell behind on bills. That’s because she had a union family that stood with her every step of the way. My mom was a proud CWA member. When times got tough, her union sisters had her back. That’s what organized labor does. When workers stick together, families make it through. This Labor Day, I’m proud to stand with unions - because our country wasn’t built by the billionaire class. **It was built by workers like my mom and millions of families like yours.** Workers keep Nashville thriving, Tennessee moving, and America strong. But Donald Trump doesn’t respect working people. As president, Trump handed out massive tax breaks to billionaires and big corporations while blocking raises to the minimum wage. He stands with billionaires and corporations who exploit us instead of lifting us up. I’m running for Congress to make sure everyday people always have a seat at the table. But I need your help to get there. **[Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to power this campaign for Tennessee’s working families?](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/dPg511c9w3cLtZ1n0ruP9A~~/AAUS1hA~/zT7PTE44LcsMOvdEs3RWRtDyHgUwd_-03YH3Ni8AGSmiIKkBEZ30KCibzXHBw62d8QU9ovEJ1f8p5kufWYkqioU1AkRGI0hMeYCr17CnPkPxlRXZzcXTFRLXL1o1RuTH3aIPPbxpTkKfon1By6oY20BLcnoxs1FMC5LO4IsVqCc~)** In solidarity,
Vincent Dixie
Candidate for Congress – TN-07

* * *
_Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first._ **[**DONATE »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/A2aFPFBMC1bfg9CpI7hKtw~~/AAUS1hA~/aSqjVuy5_GmaY8juSgVkWZDJRaa3EIc1tZ99jS-P9yGFD1bgBx2TmIVIHnNC0WfUQJW0QsQGNGXfZoafvFwRHNs4Trqnm6s4xQMQebaImZgKuXlEKmGDGmDgFZIzb_Orh_wO8izHElgQmATqZ_1PGasSXtjU397v2IrSSSWURsw~) ** **

body:
House Majority PAC is the only organization solely focused on defeating Republicans and reclaiming our Majority. We’d hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/24Z_uglcS0W47A1eQlEQag2?unsubscribedata=ACFLJcl6P2tk%2Fr97yCHzotSFt%2FJCVNBSMyRzbwBYbkvEIdgEuSPWBe6F8G1cN3QU8fXjAfVjSKIkrXvFbp4kAmkXO9q1Q6QRzp6GJdBzg6j0z2d%2BXu64TGhjjoF4hLfSvhdNPLG1kH%2FArtel6uTrAxyE1lcuzB01tLmYYsVAaDQ%2Fe1ZpcuQeZcBjlL%2BFwBAex6goZb%2FINrnj4JuVBgNNkPxX2s0elnPiuys6YwKHJfR%2FmgYyma0lbFdbqO5clIM1OPuR0IYMXvU3GVg482LgRgImOTTPsPqyndEcPr8UMRb7CedJqA1j4T2RPCxHNgui6TmD9GCSPZgtpBSjzfBgn1Bn%2BwhpNr%2F1GIyLrLMZkeeGWwqNAoeBVnUnzak1cRD2jS86SOaWAz4B1cOqV9p8GDKamMYQ8fNMWMGPcs6E9AWG9Hy01xj4J1PHqvZ7UINv]
We’ll get right to the point.

Over the past few months we’ve watched Republicans...

– SLASH the health care our veterans fought for.

– IGNORE the rising prices of everyday costs.

---|---|---
It was Independence Day weekend 2022 and I was in Chicago to report on the shootings that were going to inevitably take place during the holiday. Growing up in the Chicagoland area, the news was never short on stories about shootings taking place in parts of the city, but the crime wave that followed the BLM riots and "Defund the police" movement resulted in shootings taking place all over the city.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Yl4Dvus2eI-qrZaQMe-_DN66RkpVXKwWndAj4nHHwq4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=172358783)
In the time I was driving around Chicago and monitoring the police scanner, I was at the scene of 12 shootings, ranging from drive-bys that caused one casualty to mass shootings that didn't make national headlines because it was business as usual for that neighborhood.
I remember one of the shootings the most because the victim was a 10-year-old boy who was shot in the leg while he was in his room because a bullet was fired into the house. It wasn't like he was outside late at night. Another scene that sticks with me was the case of a drive-by shooting on a man, who was with his significant other and child in the car with him. The man was shot at least 10 times. While the other two were not hit with bullets, the child was hit by the glass shards.
One night, I waited outside Stroger Hospital after a mass shooting. Families of shooting victims often gather there while waiting on news of their loved ones. One thing I'll never forget was how one woman put her head right on a large potted plant and wailed for so long that once she finally walked away, she left behind large tear stains on the pot.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/e93e2aff-092d-42c1-8cb1-68fd454dcd40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[RFK Jr's chemtrail BOMBSHELL](https://substack.com/redirect/e93e2aff-092d-42c1-8cb1-68fd454dcd40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e93e2aff-092d-42c1-8cb1-68fd454dcd40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
It's happening.
After decades of unanswered questions... And deadly flooding in Texas.
The Trump Admin has finally had ENOUGH. RFK Jr has promised to do everything in his power to _**stop chemtrails**_.
And congress is finally drafting a bill that will make weather modification a _**FELONY**_ across the country.
Liberals are laughing... Just like they did about the COVID lab leak, microplastics and so much more.
**But this won 't stop with chemtrails**.
We've identified **[5 deadly threats](https://substack.com/redirect/e93e2aff-092d-42c1-8cb1-68fd454dcd40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that RFK Jr and the Trump admin are taking head on in 2025.
These **[hidden epidemics](https://substack.com/redirect/e93e2aff-092d-42c1-8cb1-68fd454dcd40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** are terrifying and life-threatening.
And if you were born before Jan 1st, 1960 you're most at risk.
Get full details **[here now](https://substack.com/redirect/e93e2aff-092d-42c1-8cb1-68fd454dcd40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
P.S. The secrets revealed in **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/e93e2aff-092d-42c1-8cb1-68fd454dcd40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could cost politically connected corporations BILLIONS... and they'll do anything to stop that from happening. Get the truth **[here now](https://substack.com/redirect/e93e2aff-092d-42c1-8cb1-68fd454dcd40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available online.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e93e2aff-092d-42c1-8cb1-68fd454dcd40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
Because I was just one person, I could not be at every shooting crime scene in the city. By Saturday of that weekend, a total of 25 people had been shot, with two more days still to go before the celebrations were over.
It wasn't just shootings I found myself reporting on. Very early Monday morning, officially Independence Day, I got back to my hotel in the Loop ready for bed after a long day only to see a street takeover happening right down the street. I headed over to see thugs blocking traffic to show off that they control the roads when they feel like it. Chicago police arrived but were driven back by a large crowd attacking their vehicles and throwing large grade fireworks at them. One firework landed on the hood of the police SUV and exploded.
When the car takeover eventually drove to another location, I overheard frustrated officers saying they needed a better plan to address situations like that.
My experience back in 2022 is just a sliver of the chaos that has long plagued the Windy City. Between the crime wave, illegal immigrants arriving by the tens of thousands during the Biden-Harris border crisis, and incompetent leadership that caused the Magnificent Mile to be a shadow of itself, Chicago has been struggling. It is far from the city I once knew.
And it has all been by choice.
President Donald Trump's plan for the National Guard to be deployed there next is not only needed, but logical. The success the Trump administration has had in making Washington, D.C. safer shows how Democrat-run cities are purposefully making the lives of its residents worse because it's what their party demands.
The response from Chicago Democrats has been predictable. Mayor Brandon Johnson, who has an almost non-existent approval rating, is playing his well-worn race card. Governor JB Pritzker was trying to prove how "safe" Chicago was by taking video of his morning walk with his security detail along the lakefront at 6:00 A.M., as if the city's criminal elements are at that location at that time.
Democrats rejecting Trump's plan for public safety shows why they are extremely unpopular right now. Their whole platform is to not deport criminal illegal aliens, keep mentally ill men in women's bathrooms, and let other criminals have control over our cities.
Unlike D.C., it appears the Guardsmen will be helping federal agents carry out operations such as immigration enforcement. D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser had to admit the extra resources Trump sent has made the city safer. It is time to actually make Chicago safe.
* * *

clean_body: Democrats rejecting Trump's plan for public safety exposes why they are extremely unpopular right now... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Democrats rejecting Trump's plan for public safety exposes why they are extremely unpopular right now... | | | Sep 1| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- It was Independence Day weekend 2022 and I was in Chicago to report on the shootings that were going to inevitably take place during the holiday. Growing up in the Chicagoland area, the news was never short on stories about shootings taking place in parts of the city, but the crime wave that followed the BLM riots and "Defund the police" movement resulted in shootings taking place all over the city. In the time I was driving around Chicago and monitoring the police scanner, I was at the scene of 12 shootings, ranging from drive-bys that caused one casualty to mass shootings that didn't make national headlines because it was business as usual for that neighborhood. I remember one of the shootings the most because the victim was a 10-year-old boy who was shot in the leg while he was in his room because a bullet was fired into the house. It wasn't like he was outside late at night. Another scene that sticks with me was the case of a drive-by shooting on a man, who was with his significant other and child in the car with him. The man was shot at least 10 times. While the other two were not hit with bullets, the child was hit by the glass shards. One night, I waited outside Stroger Hospital after a mass shooting. Families of shooting victims often gather there while waiting on news of their loved ones. One thing I'll never forget was how one woman put her head right on a large potted plant and wailed for so long that once she finally walked away, she left behind large tear stains on the pot. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) | | ---|---|--- Dear Reader, It's happening. After decades of unanswered questions... And deadly flooding in Texas. The Trump Admin has finally had ENOUGH. RFK Jr has promised to do everything in his power to stop chemtrails. And congress is finally drafting a bill that will make weather modification a FELONY across the country. Liberals are laughing... Just like they did about the COVID lab leak, microplastics and so much more. But this won 't stop with chemtrails. We've identified that RFK Jr and the Trump admin are taking head on in 2025. These are terrifying and life-threatening. And if you were born before Jan 1st, 1960 you're most at risk. Get full details . P.S. The secrets revealed in could cost politically connected corporations BILLIONS... and they'll do anything to stop that from happening. Get the truth while it's still available online. (Piece continues) Because I was just one person, I could not be at every shooting crime scene in the city. By Saturday of that weekend, a total of 25 people had been shot, with two more days still to go before the celebrations were over. It wasn't just shootings I found myself reporting on. Very early Monday morning, officially Independence Day, I got back to my hotel in the Loop ready for bed after a long day only to see a street takeover happening right down the street. I headed over to see thugs blocking traffic to show off that they control the roads when they feel like it. Chicago police arrived but were driven back by a large crowd attacking their vehicles and throwing large grade fireworks at them. One firework landed on the hood of the police SUV and exploded. When the car takeover eventually drove to another location, I overheard frustrated officers saying they needed a better plan to address situations like that. My experience back in 2022 is just a sliver of the chaos that has long plagued the Windy City. Between the crime wave, illegal immigrants arriving by the tens of thousands during the Biden-Harris border crisis, and incompetent leadership that caused the Magnificent Mile to be a shadow of itself, Chicago has been struggling. It is far from the city I once knew. And it has all been by choice. President Donald Trump's plan for the National Guard to be deployed there next is not only needed, but logical. The success the Trump administration has had in making Washington, D.C. safer shows how Democrat-run cities are purposefully making the lives of its residents worse because it's what their party demands. The response from Chicago Democrats has been predictable. Mayor Brandon Johnson, who has an almost non-existent approval rating, is playing his well-worn race card. Governor JB Pritzker was trying to prove how "safe" Chicago was by taking video of his morning walk with his security detail along the lakefront at 6:00 A.M., as if the city's criminal elements are at that location at that time. Democrats rejecting Trump's plan for public safety shows why they are extremely unpopular right now. Their whole platform is to not deport criminal illegal aliens, keep mentally ill men in women's bathrooms, and let other criminals have control over our cities. Unlike D.C., it appears the Guardsmen will be helping federal agents carry out operations such as immigration enforcement. D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser had to admit the extra resources Trump sent has made the city safer. It is time to actually make Chicago safe. * | A guest post by| Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. Subscribe to my newsletter for original content as I travel the United States and beyond. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Why are students begging for this hat?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/3ddee54e29e94dcc8100cf22f62cd371-a33a63a7150c4667b8681a0c918e3d81/63)
---
Friend,
---
I’ll cut straight to the point... I want to send you a FREE limited-edition “47” hat... The same hat college students have literally begged for during our campus tour stops.
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/3ddee54e29e94dcc8100cf22f62cd371-a33a63a7150c4667b8681a0c918e3d81/63)
---
But this isn’t just any hat... It’s a symbol. A symbol of what’s happening right now across college campuses in America. _Students are waking up... Chanting “USA!”... Waving flags... and standing up for faith, family, and freedom._ Everywhere Turning Point USA goes, we’re seeing record crowds — thousands of students — fired up to defend this country and reject the Left’s lies. And guess what? **They’re PROUD to be American.** This isn’t just a moment... It's not a mere “shift”... This is a generational REVOLUTION! **And Friend, I want YOU to be part of it.** _All I ask?_ **Make a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA reach even more young people...** ...and I’ll send you a limited-edition “47” hat as my thank-you.
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**
**Claim Your “47” Hat**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/3ddee54e29e94dcc8100cf22f62cd371-a33a63a7150c4667b8681a0c918e3d81/63)
---
Friend, this isn’t a gimmick... It’s not another piece of “merch”... This hat means something. To every student who wears one — it’s a statement: _“I’m not afraid to stand up for this country.”_ To every patriot like you who fuels this mission — it’s a reminder:_“I helped wake up a generation. I helped build a movement.”_
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/3ddee54e29e94dcc8100cf22f62cd371-a33a63a7150c4667b8681a0c918e3d81/63)
---
**The “47” hat is a badge of honor for people who are saving this country.** **So please — make your first gift now to help Turning Point USA push this movement even further...** 🔥 More campuses
🔥 More students
🔥 More hearts and minds changed _And I’ll send you your “47” hat as a symbol of the mission you’ve joined._
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The Christian counter to drag queen story hour
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e20784536/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvWEVGcHdzUFJLQw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDE/LbmNsTjdvSVhxUA/qP2hpZHM9bmM5UkRTS0xnQ0Jqelhscw/gaLYcjw/sak8a42e4bb)
| | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
| | Patriot, I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library! Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_. But today, all that has changed. The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.” Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series. And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| But that’s just not true. <\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true. THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[ ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse. But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.” That may be good for your family – for now. But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! [**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.” I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here’s the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own. So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours... ...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress! What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year. But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA. Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_**
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron
---
|
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304
---

name: Indiana Democrats
subject: Happy Labor Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Every day, and especially today, we salute the contributions of working Hoosiers and organized labor to our state. Organized labor built our state, and continues to lead the fight for a state where every person can work hard and achieve the American dream. Indiana Democrats were thrilled to join them in parades and festivities in both Lowell and in Boonville, where thousands came out to celebrate the day and workers across our state and country. We’re proud to have elected officials like Congressmen Frank Mrvan and André Carson who support them every day. Check out the scenes from some of Indiana’s biggest Labor Day celebrations. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114430536/567000114/1764064610?refcode=250901labor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2Q4MDg4ZS04Mjg3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0uK-sYkauaXWZTBtJoKyrX0xfPUVpUyJljIfuMXOcRc=)****[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114430537/567000115/1764064610?refcode=250901labor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2Q4MDg4ZS04Mjg3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0uK-sYkauaXWZTBtJoKyrX0xfPUVpUyJljIfuMXOcRc=)** Indiana is made stronger by our unions and our workers — and it’s time we had a state that uplifted their work. **[If you’re so inclined, consider making a donation to the Indiana Democrats today to power our efforts into 2026 and beyond.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114430538/567000116/1764064610?refcode=250901labor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2Q4MDg4ZS04Mjg3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0uK-sYkauaXWZTBtJoKyrX0xfPUVpUyJljIfuMXOcRc=)** In solidarity,

name: STAND WITH NPR! (via VPP)
subject: NPR FIGHTS BACK against Trump >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
this is HUGE
| | **FIRST:** Trump signed an executive order DEMANDING cuts to NPR!

**THEN:** NPR FOUGHT BACK! _They just SUED Trump over his unconstitutional executive order:_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250901_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21022%2E878179%2EooJKDp) **NOW:** [**We need 25,000 Democrats to join NPR in this must-win fight for the freedom of the press. DeSantis is painting over rainbow crosswalks in the name of fighting “wokeness”, imprisoning undocumented people in Alligator Alcatraz, and promising to gerrymander Democrats out of the state.
**Electing more Democrats tomorrow gives our party two more fighters against his far-right agenda.**
[Republican governors are threatening redistricting in six states, including Florida. name: A personal message from Marlene
subject: I’m a proud, pro-labor Democrat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114431225/567002568/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.01_Labor-Endorsement_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjMyNThjMDAtOGM4Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mBKJl9uj2JCKrER0fXUQ8lsiAIBjE0c-Su-EBJDYk8A=)
---
It’s Labor Day, and today, I’m grateful for the workers who keep our economy strong — and the labor unions that fight tirelessly for fair wages and protections. I’m a pro-labor Democrat — and I’m proud to be endorsed by the United Food and Commercial Workers and the International Association of Fire Fighters, making me the _only_ labor-endorsed candidate in AZ-01. **I’m running to unseat David Schweikert, who has openly _criticized_ labor unions and voted _against_ legislation that would strengthen them and protect the right to organize.** I’m ready to fight for common-sense legislation that lowers costs, protects healthcare, and secures a better future for working families. We all deserve a chance to achieve our version of the American dream. **_[So, if you can spare a few dollars today to send me to Congress to represent AZ-01, will you donate to my grassroots campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114431226/567002569/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.01_Labor-Endorsement_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjMyNThjMDAtOGM4Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mBKJl9uj2JCKrER0fXUQ8lsiAIBjE0c-Su-EBJDYk8A=)_** | [CHIP IN TODAY >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114431227/567002570/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.01_Labor-Endorsement_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjMyNThjMDAtOGM4Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mBKJl9uj2JCKrER0fXUQ8lsiAIBjE0c-Su-EBJDYk8A=)

Thank you,
Marlene Galán-Woods
